Bg_Line1: {伴随着封灵碑诞生的女孩，左眼有着圣女的印记，那是上一任四大祭司之一——暗魔法使用者意志的传承。}
Bg_Line2: {从小被当作圣女培养的辛身上肩负着救世的重任，自懂事起便被教育不能意气用事，同龄的玩伴也被长辈告知不能轻易接近，“强大”于别人而言是望尘莫及的星星，于她，则是如影随形的禁锢。}
Bg_Line3: {如今，她已不会再感到孤独，如果维持世界秩序是她的宿命，那么她期望在这场旅途中找到只属于自己的存在的意义。}
Bg_Line1_en: With the birth of the tablet, the girl's left eye bears the mark of a saint, which is one of the last four high priests and the inheritance of the will of the users of dark magic.
Bg_Line2_en: Saintess Shin, who was raised as a saint from childhood, shoulders the responsibility of saving the world. She has been taught since she was a child that she can't be spirited. Her playmates of the same age are also told by her elders that they can't be easily approached. She is stronger than others. She is a star that can't catch up with others.
Bg_Line3_en: Now, she will not feel lonely any more. If maintaining world order is her destiny, she hopes to find her own meaning in this journey

Bg_Line1: {五百年前的“灭魔之战”结束后，克丽奥娜常常感到无聊，虽然17岁小姑娘的模样总让人忘记她拥有多么可怕的力量，但作为兽人族元老之一，她做事雷厉风行说一不二，族内年轻的兽人都害怕她，除了海芙约特。}
Bg_Line4: {克丽奥娜看着海芙约特傻笑的样子，突然觉得不那么无聊了。}
Bg_Line1_en: Since the end of the "battle of demons" five hundred years ago, Cliodna often feels bored. Although the appearance of a 17-year-old girl always makes people forget how terrible she has power, as one of the veterans of the orcs, she does things with great vigour, and the young orcs in the orcs are afraid of her, except Herfjoture.
Bg_Line2_en:
"Cliodna, I just learned a new move. Want to try it out?"
Without even lifting her eyelids, she replied, "No, boring."
Among the younger generation, only Herfjotur would address her so directly, claiming it could bring them closer. It was quite rude, but never mind—she would let it slide since Herfjotur was a junior.
Bg_Line3_en:
"This time, I promise it's super amazing!" After saying that, she swung her axe mercilessly with a move she had learned who-knows-where.
Cliodna raised her hand and blocked it lightly. Hmph, not bad, she thought to herself, better than last time. But that didn't stop her from saying one thing while meaning another: "Is that it? Don't embarrass our beastmen race."
"Eh? I thought it was pretty good, hehe. As expected of Cliodna."
Bg_Line4_en: As Cliodna watched Herfjotur's silly grin, she suddenly felt that things weren't so boring after all.

Bg_Line1:
{德莉法希望妹妹能永远单纯善良下去。
3岁的妹妹或许并没有记忆，但5岁的她忘不了和妹妹流落街头受尽白眼，连续饿了三天肚子，那时候她就想，以后无论如何也要和妹妹过上幸福生活。}
Bg_Line2:
{幸运的是她遇见了好心的孤儿院院长巴特利特。
那时候的妹妹过得似乎很快乐，日子平静而幸福，但她总觉得这还远远不够，她总在渴望着拥有更多。}
Bg_Line3: {出事的那天，妹妹像以往的无数个日子一样拉着她去山上采野果，傍晚又懒懒地赖着不想走，但没想到的是回来的时候整个村庄已经不复存在。当平静被打破，一切都那么措手不及。}
Bg_Line4: {她只能带着妹妹继续流浪，最后请求魔法学院收留。她如愿的跟妹妹住进了大房子，并跟着魔法学院的西尔芙学习了有关风的魔法，尽管妹妹一如既往地撒娇胡闹，但她总感觉妹妹变了，或许等她强大到无往不利的时候，就能再次见到妹妹无忧无虑的笑容了吧。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Derifa hoped that her younger sister could remain pure and kind forever.
Her 3-year-old sister might not have any memories, but at 5 years old, Derifa could never forget the days when they were homeless on the streets, enduring scorn and going hungry for three days straight. Back then, she vowed that no matter what, she would ensure a happy life for her sister.
Bg_Line2_en:
Fortunately, she met the kind orphanage director, Bartlett.
At that time, her sister seemed to be living happily, with peaceful and content days, but she always felt it was far from enough. She was always yearning for more.
Bg_Line3_en: On the day of the incident, her sister, as she had done on countless days before, dragged her to the mountains to pick wild fruits. In the evening, she lazily lingered, not wanting to leave. But what they didn't expect was that when they returned, the entire village was gone. When peace was shattered, everything happened so suddenly.
Bg_Line4_en: She had no choice but to continue wandering with her sister, eventually seeking refuge at the magic academy. She got her wish and moved into a large house with her sister, learning wind magic from Sylph at the academy. Although her sister was as mischievous and playful as ever, she couldn't shake the feeling that her sister had changed. Perhaps when she became powerful enough to overcome any obstacle, she would see her sister's carefree smile again.

Bg_Line1:
{乌米伽最近新来了个舞姬，一时间不少王公贵族不远千里，一掷千金只求少女能为自己独舞一曲。
鲜艳的长裙随着她的步伐旋转，白皙纤长的手在空中变换出各种姿态，连头发丝都好似注入灵魂，每一次舞动都撩人心弦。}
Bg_Line2: {半年前忒菲丝自森林的小木屋醒来就很多事都不记得了，只隐隐约约能想起一个叫“落埃之城”的地方。她本能地跳舞，竟发现自己的舞蹈能根据观看者内心的渴望编织幻境，看着他们或哭或笑，忒菲丝空洞的内心只觉羡慕。}
Bg_Line3: {后来有人告诉她，当年瓦妮莎的得力干将铁甲将军似乎与“落埃之城”有关，或许铁甲将军可以带给她记忆的线索。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Recently, a new dancer arrived in Umiga, and in no time, numerous nobles and royals traveled great distances, spending fortunes just to have the girl perform a solo dance for them.
Her vibrant long skirt twirled with her steps, her fair and slender hands shifting into various poses in the air. Even strands of her hair seemed infused with soul, every movement captivating the heart.
Bg_Line2_en: Half a year ago, Thefis woke up in a small cabin in the forest, having forgotten many things. She could only vaguely recall a place called "City of Fallen Dust." She danced instinctively and discovered that her dance could weave illusions based on the desires of those watching. Seeing them cry or laugh, Thefis felt only envy in her hollow heart.
Bg_Line3_en: Later, someone told her that Crocodile, Vanessa's trusted general from back then, seemed to have a connection to the "City of Fallen Dust." Perhaps Crocodile could provide her with clues to her memories.

Bg_Line2:
{“厄洛丝小姐，我喜欢你很久了，请务必和我交往。”
厄洛丝看着对方真挚的眼神，露出了练习无数遍的完美微笑，说道：“谢谢学弟的喜欢哦，我会继续努力的。”
“厄洛丝小姐，我买了所有你喜欢的东西！请你收下吧！我爱你！和我交往吧！”
“谢谢，学弟你让一让，挡到路了哟。”}
Bg_Line3:
{“想走？”追求者挡住了她，霎时一只触手破土而出，“你今天不答应跟我交往，我是不会让你走的。”
厄洛丝目光逐渐变冷，说道：“召唤术？想和我决斗吗？别不自量力了！”}
Bg_Line4:
{战斗顷刻结束，触手瞬间化为云烟，与其说是战斗更不如说是单方面的实力碾压。
“真是令人不爽。”厄洛丝理了理自己微微皱起的衣角，微笑看向失败后呆坐在地上的追求者，“学弟不要告诉别人哟，这是我们的秘密。”}
Bg_Line1_en:
As one of the most sought-after elves at the magic academy, Eros, with her sweet appearance and personality, possesses a beautiful voice and is admired by many juniors.
She enjoys the stage, flowers, and screams, accustomed to being the center of attention wherever she goes.
Of course, she occasionally encounters surprises.
Bg_Line2_en:
"Miss Eros, I've liked you for a long time. Please, go out with me."
Eros looked at the sincere expression in the other person's eyes and flashed a perfectly practiced smile, saying, "Thank you for your affection, junior. I'll keep working hard."
"Miss Eros, I bought everything you like! Please accept it! I love you! Go out with me!"
"Thank you, junior. Could you move aside? You're blocking the way."
Bg_Line3_en:
"Trying to leave?" The suitor blocked her path, and in an instant, a tentacle burst from the ground. "If you don't agree to go out with me today, I won't let you leave."
Eros's gaze gradually turned cold as she said, "Summoning magic? You want to duel me? Don't overestimate yourself!"
Bg_Line4_en:
The battle ended in an instant, the tentacles dissipating into smoke. It was less of a fight and more of a one-sided display of overwhelming power.
"How annoying," Eros said, smoothing the slightly wrinkled corner of her clothes. She smiled at the suitor, who sat stunned on the ground after his defeat. "Don't tell anyone, junior. This is our little secret."

Bg_Line1: {继承了暗夜精灵一族最纯正血统的斯莉德，不甘臣服于哥哥的统治，很早的时候便脱离了家族，去追求着绝对的力量，她喜欢战斗时肾上腺素飙升的感觉。}
Bg_Line2:
{瓦妮莎找过她。
尽管并不想被麻烦的家伙缠上，但说实话，她不讨厌瓦妮莎这样的性格，有野心有手段，某些地方跟自己甚至出奇地相似。}
Bg_Line3: {可她们终究不是一路人，斯莉德知道，瓦妮莎是个百分百的“疯子”，如果没有想要守护的东西，自己或许真的会加入迪布克组织也说不定，但这个世界原本就没有如果。}
Bg_Line1_en: Slider, who inherited the purest bloodline of the Dark Elves, refused to submit to her brother's rule. She left her family early to pursue absolute power. She loved the adrenaline rush that came with battle.
Bg_Line2_en:
Vanessa had sought her out.
Although she didn't want to be bothered by troublesome people, to be honest, she didn't dislike Vanessa's personality—ambitious and resourceful, with some surprising similarities to herself.
Bg_Line3_en: But in the end, they were not the same kind of people. Slider knew that Vanessa was a complete "madwoman." If she didn't have something she wanted to protect, she might have truly joined the Dibuk organization. But in this world, there are no "what ifs."

Bg_Line1: {二十年前默林赛斯镇的贫穷逐渐蔓延到镇上的各个角落，水源稀缺，土地无法长期供应植被和作物生长，大量镇民流亡去了别处，久而久之那里成为了周边最穷苦的的地方。}
Bg_Line2: {所以乌蒂亚到来的那天她受到了不少注目，穿着黑色礼裙的美丽少女显然与这里格格不入，但她似乎丝毫没有感到不适，只是高昂着头在镇子里来回走了好一阵。稍晚的时候有人看见她出现在空地，像是在布阵又像是在施展某种法术。}
Bg_Line3:
{第二天整个默林赛斯镇沸腾了，原本空旷的土地上长出一棵参天大树，绿油油的枝叶形成了巨大的树冠，树根处甚至有汩汩清水冒出地面。
乌蒂亚满意地坐在树枝上，每有一个镇民前来，她都会为其发放一些种子，并告知其种植的方式。}
Bg_Line4: {二十年过去，默林赛斯镇靠着“生命之树”发展得越发繁华，尽管这期间乌蒂亚再也没出现过，但小巷里始终流传着她的故事。其中最可靠的一种猜想是“生命之树”来自某个失传已久的法术，而精灵少女则是来自行踪飘忽不定的巫女一族。}
Bg_Line1_en: Twenty years ago, poverty in Merlinseath gradually spread to every corner of the town. Water was scarce, and the land could no longer sustain vegetation or crops. Many townsfolk fled to other places, and over time, it became the most impoverished area in the region.
Bg_Line2_en: On the day Utia arrived, she drew quite a bit of attention. The beautiful girl in a black dress clearly stood out from the surroundings, yet she showed no sign of discomfort. Instead, she held her head high and wandered around the town for quite some time. Later in the evening, someone spotted her in an open field, seemingly setting up an array or casting some kind of spell.
Bg_Line3_en: The next day, the entire town of Merlinseath was in an uproar. A towering tree had suddenly grown on the previously barren land, its lush green foliage forming a massive canopy, with clear water gushing out from its roots. Utia sat contentedly on a branch, distributing seeds to each townsfolk who came and carefully explaining how to plant them.
Bg_Line4_en: Twenty years passed, and Merlinseath flourished with the help of the "Tree of Life." Though Utia never appeared again during this time, stories about her continued to circulate in the alleyways. The most plausible theory suggested that the Tree of Life originated from some long-lost magic, and that the elven maiden belonged to an elusive clan of witches.

Bg_Line1:
{百年前，家族风头正盛的时候在某个贵族举办的舞会上，珀瑞斯跟奥尔露恩有过一面之缘。
那时候她说，新月升起之日，我们会再见面的。}
Bg_Line2:
{新月来临那天，奥尔露恩如期而至，她看着呆坐在窗边的少女，一脸心疼地说道：“珀瑞斯，你现在为何如此憔悴？”
珀瑞斯看清来人后，她低头捂住自己的右脸，咬牙说：“完了！一切都完了！那群混蛋！封印松动了。我的脸也受伤了！我该怎么办？”}
Bg_Line3: {奥尔露恩为难地看向女人，说道：“我倒是知道西南方向有一个叫莉莉丝的赤精灵可以帮你，但……你可能需要付出点代价。”}
Bg_Line1_en:
A century ago, when the family was at the height of its prominence, Perris and Olrun crossed paths at a ball hosted by a noble.
Back then, she said, "On the day the new moon rises, we will meet again."
Bg_Line2_en:
On the day the new moon arrived, Olrun came as promised. Looking at the girl sitting blankly by the window, she said with a pained expression, "Perris, why do you look so haggard now?"
After recognizing who had come, Perris lowered her head, covering her right face, and gritted her teeth, saying, "It's over! Everything is over! Those bastards! The seal has loosened. My face is injured too! What should I do?"
Bg_Line3_en: Olrun looked at the woman with a troubled expression and said, "I do know of a red elf named Lilith in the southwest who might be able to help you, but... you may need to pay a price."
Bg_Line4_en:
Perris's expression gradually calmed, as if she were still the proud and elegant lady from the ball.
"As long as I can gain power, I am willing to pay any price."
When she reappeared in people's sight, Perris was even more beautiful than before. This time, she was here to recruit maids.

Bg_Line1:
{作为圣骑士团的灵魂，罗兰时时关注着世界的变化。
直到很久以后，罗兰回想自己之所以来到圣骑士团，也一定是因为被尤缇迦的鸡汤给洗脑了，但事实证明，尤缇迦是对的。}
Bg_Line2:
{在见过贫瘠、穷苦，经历过背叛、暗斗之后，她确实成长了。
虽然现在也常常因为行事风格不同而跟尤缇迦发生争执，但两人从来不会强行要求对方认同自己，很多人或许不知道，私底下的她俩确实算得上彼此的知己。}
Bg_Line3:
{闲暇的时间，她总是坐在城墙最高的地方凝视城镇，每每这个时候，她的脑子里会闪过无数念头，有时候是对局势的分析，有时候是对人性的思考。
在家时，罗兰是虽然有点挑食，却很好相处的大小姐，而在面对魔物时，她却冷静而善战。}
Bg_Line1_en:
As the soul of the Holy Knights, Roland always kept an eye on the changes in the world.
It wasn't until much later that Roland reflected on why he had joined the Holy Knights—it must have been because he was brainwashed by Utija's motivational speeches. But in the end, the facts proved that Utija was right.
Bg_Line2_en:
After witnessing poverty and hardship, and experiencing betrayal and covert struggles, she had indeed grown.
Although she often clashed with Utija due to their differing approaches, neither of them ever forced the other to agree with their views. Many might not know, but in private, they were truly each other's confidants.
Bg_Line3_en:
In her spare time, she would always sit at the highest point of the city walls, gazing at the town. During these moments, countless thoughts would flash through her mind—sometimes analyzing the situation, other times pondering human nature.
At home, Roland was a somewhat picky but easygoing young lady, yet when facing monsters, she was calm and skilled in battle.

Bg_Line1:
{生生世世，花不见叶、叶不见花，彼岸花娇艳，却总让人心伤。古里拉河旁的彼岸花又开了。
暗夜里似乎隐隐觉得有眼睛盯着她，须佐真希知道这场战斗不可避免，她背靠月色，手中的刀微微颤抖，屏气凝息，静候着……}
Bg_Line2:
{“不愧是最强铸刀师须佐家最后的血脉，”黑暗中，一个女人的声音传来，“手上那把就是妖刀彼岸了吧，乖乖交出来，我就饶了你。”
“休想。”}
Bg_Line4:
{“这么热闹怎么能少了我？”清真纪的声音划拨夜空。
胜利的天平逐渐倾斜，女人愤然离开时只盯着彼岸说是会再回来。
“我是不是该知道你叫什么了？”
“嗯。”}
Bg_Line1_en:
Life after life, the flowers never see the leaves, and the leaves never see the flowers. The higanbana is stunning, yet it always brings sorrow. By the Kurila River, the higanbana have bloomed once more.
In the dark night, she faintly felt eyes watching her. SusaMaki knew this battle was inevitable. With her back to the moonlight, her blade trembled slightly as she held her breath, waiting silently...
Bg_Line2_en:
"As expected of the last descendant of the Susa family, the greatest swordsmiths," a woman's voice came from the darkness. "That blade in your hand is the demon sword Higan, isn't it? Hand it over obediently, and I'll spare you."
"Not a chance."
Bg_Line3_en:
The blade ignited in crimson flames in an instant, the firelight illuminating SusaMaki's profile. She leaped lightly into the air, her sword swift as lightning.
SusaMaki turned and pointed her blade at the woman, but the woman's agility kept SusaMaki from closing the distance. The two were locked in a stalemate, neither able to gain the upper hand.
A flash of silver light broke the deadlock—a katana.
Bg_Line4_en:
"How could I miss out on all this excitement?" Seimaki's voice cut through the night sky.
The scales of victory gradually tilted, and the woman left in anger, her eyes fixed on Higan as she vowed to return.
"Shouldn't I know your name by now?"
"Mm."

Bg_Line1:
{克图格亚有一个秘密。
白天她是高高在上的圣女，而夜晚来临之时，她将化身审判者，带着神的旨意审判罪恶。}
Bg_Line2:
{与其他圣女不同，她从来不去议会，也不接受莫须有的约束。克图格亚的世界里善恶分明，秩序不能主持的正义就让她来主持吧。
“本大爷才没必要跟那群罗里吧嗦的麻烦鬼浪费时间呢。” 克图格亚这么说到。}
Bg_Line3: {世间有很多关于她的传说，神化她或是诋毁她，但不管怎样，有这么一位正义使者，大部分人都觉得安心，城内的魔物也直线锐减。虽然长时间没人作恶的感觉有点无聊，但克图格亚对这样的场面很是欣慰。}
Bg_Line4: {白天大部分时间，她都穿着华丽的长裙坐在花园里，边品着下午茶，边听着邦妮的汇报，她想：真不愧是本大爷，可比尤缇迦的方法奏效多了。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Cthugha has a secret.
By day, she is the revered saintess, but when night falls, she transforms into a judge, carrying out divine judgment against evil.
Bg_Line2_en:
Unlike other saintesses, she never attends councils nor accepts unnecessary constraints. In Cthugha's world, good and evil are clearly defined, and if order cannot uphold justice, she will take it upon herself to do so.
"I have no need to waste time with those long-winded troublemakers," Cthugha said.
Bg_Line3_en: There are many legends about her in the world, some deifying her, others slandering her. But regardless, with such a righteous enforcer around, most people feel at ease, and the number of monsters in the city has sharply decreased. Although the long stretch without wrongdoing feels a bit boring, Cthugha is quite pleased with this state of affairs.
Bg_Line4_en: For most of the day, she sat in the garden wearing an elegant long dress, sipping afternoon tea while listening to Bonnie's reports. She thought: "As expected of me, my methods are far more effective than Utija's."

Bg_Line1:
{如果问圣骑士团中谁最强势，那一定是罗兰，但如果问谁最可怕，第三骑士“灾星”波蒙当之无愧。
波蒙喜欢黑色，属于夜晚的颜色。她的力量在战斗中积蓄，长矛只对准敌人，滚烫的汗珠溅上她黑色的长裙，不一会儿便晕染开来。}
Bg_Line2: {波蒙幼时曾经流浪过一段时光，“哇哇”的哭喊声惹人心生怜爱，是当地一个没有子女的好心贵族把她领回了家。女主人待她极好，陪她度过了一个温暖的童年。}
Bg_Line3: {可是蛮族的入侵打破了她平静的生活，她拼尽全力才得以逃生，从此漫长的流浪之旅开始。那以后，她所经之处总会发生不幸，“灾星”的称号也由此得来。}
Bg_Line4: {直到加入圣骑士团，疲惫的心被战意激活，她意识到，如果厄运的起源来自世界的混乱，那么恢复正常秩序的方法唯有战斗。}
Bg_Line1_en:
If asked who is the most dominant in the Holy Knight Order, it would undoubtedly be Roland. But if asked who is the most fearsome, the third knight "Calamity Star" Pomon deserves that title.
Pomon adores black, the color of night. Her power accumulates in battle, her spear aimed only at enemies. Scorching sweat droplets splatter onto her black gown, spreading like ink before long.
Bg_Line2_en: In her childhood, Pomon had once been a wanderer. Her "waa waa" cries stirred compassion in others, until a kind-hearted, childless noble from the area took her home. The lady of the house treated her exceedingly well, giving her a warm childhood to remember.
Bg_Line3_en: But the barbarians' invasion shattered her peaceful life. She barely escaped with her life, thus beginning her long wandering journey. Since then, misfortune always followed wherever she went, earning her the epithet "Calamity Star."
Bg_Line4_en: It wasn't until she joined the Holy Knight Order that her weary heart was reignited by fighting spirit. She realized that if misfortune originated from the world's chaos, then the only way to restore order was through battle.

Bg_Line1: {九尾狐在兽人族中是非常罕见的种类，荒的到来无疑引起了不小轰动。}
Bg_Line2: {那天，貌美的九尾少女与族长与交谈了很久，没人知道他们说了些什么，只知道族长从屋内出来后神情凝重，而少女紧随其后，脸上与来时无异，并看不出表情。}
Bg_Line3: {之后再没人在兽人族见过荒，据部分上了年纪的兽人回忆，他们曾在小时候与荒有过一面之缘，那时候的荒外表与现在变化不大，也是这样来去匆匆。}
Bg_Line4: {有人说她只在兽人族危机的时候出现，也有人说她受第一任族长所托，往返于各个大陆之间，寻找着世界的秘密。}
Bg_Line1_en: The nine-tailed fox is an extremely rare species among the beastmen, and Susabi's arrival undoubtedly caused quite a stir.
Bg_Line2_en: That day, the beautiful nine-tailed girl spoke with the clan leader for a long time. No one knew what they discussed, but it was clear that the leader emerged from the room with a grave expression, while the girl followed closely behind, her face as unreadable as when she had arrived.
Bg_Line3_en: After that, no one ever saw Susabi among the beastmen again. According to some older beastmen, they had briefly encountered Susabi in their childhood. Back then, Susabi's appearance was not much different from now, and they were just as elusive.
Bg_Line4_en: Some say she only appears during times of crisis for the beastmen, while others claim she was entrusted by the first clan leader to travel between continents, seeking the secrets of the world.

Bg_Line1:
{还在森林居住的时候，巴斯特便经常往拉法叶的小木屋跑。
为了安神，拉法叶会在小木屋里点上一支木香，等巴斯特来时自己就将书里看到的故事讲给她听。}
Bg_Line2:
{巴斯特永远一副睡不醒的样子，那天她迷迷糊糊间被森林里暗藏的陷阱刺伤，找到拉法叶的时候委屈极了，趁着拉法叶给自己找消毒药剂的时间，她玩起了掉落在地上的羽毛。
巴斯特惊讶地看着自己的伤口渐渐愈合，最后连疤痕也逐渐消失。}
Bg_Line4: {拉法叶没有哭着回来，当克丽奥娜听到拉法叶成为圣骑士团第六骑士时，她嘴角不自觉地上扬了一下，嗯，是个不错的后辈。}
Bg_Line1_en:
When they still lived in the forest, Bast would often visit Lafayette's small wooden cabin.
To soothe the mind, Lafayette would light a stick of incense in the cabin and, when Bast arrived, tell her stories from the books he had read.
Bg_Line2_en:
Bast always looked like she couldn't wake up properly. That day, in her dazed state, she was injured by a hidden trap in the forest. When she found Lafayette, she was extremely upset. While Lafayette searched for disinfectant, she played with a feather that had fallen on the ground.
Bast watched in amazement as her wound gradually healed, and even the scar eventually disappeared.
Bg_Line3_en:
Since mastering the method of healing wounds with feathers, Lafayette had always wanted to use this power to help more people.
To this end, she sought out Elder Cliodna.
"Junior, don't think of this world as too perfect. But if you truly want to realize your worth, go out and explore. Just don't come back crying."
Bg_Line4_en: Lafayette did not come back crying. When Cliodna heard that Lafayette had become the sixth knight of the Holy Knights, the corner of her mouth unconsciously twitched upward. Hmm, not a bad junior.

Bg_Line1: {瑞亚直到现在都还记得父亲离开时的场景，五百年前的瑞亚还很年幼，父亲一只手便把她捞到了肩上，并慈爱地摸了摸她的头，告诉她，等他回来之后就带小瑞亚去视野最开阔的地方数星星。}
Bg_Line2:
{瑞亚左顾右盼，最后只等来了父亲留下的盾和战甲。
五百年过去，魔物再次作祟，瑞亚毫不犹豫地选择了加入隶属于圣骑士团的军队，这些年来她从未停止过对自己的修炼，为的就是有天能继承父亲的意志。}
Bg_Line3: {瑞亚将父亲的战甲做了改良穿戴在自己身上，临行前带上了陪伴父亲征战沙场的山峦之盾，这一次，她誓要将魔物一并消灭。}
Bg_Line1_en: Rhea still remembers the scene when her father left. Five hundred years ago, Rhea was still very young. Her father lifted her onto his shoulder with one hand and lovingly patted her head, telling her that when he returned, he would take little Rhea to the most open place to count the stars.
Bg_Line2_en:
Rhea looked around, but in the end, all she received was the shield and armor left by her father.
Five hundred years passed, and the monsters began to stir once more. Without hesitation, Rhea chose to join the army under the Holy Knights. Over the years, she had never stopped training herself, all for the day she could inherit her father's will.
Bg_Line3_en: Rhea modified her father's armor and wore it herself. Before setting off, she took the Mountain Shield that had accompanied her father on the battlefield. This time, she vowed to eradicate the monsters once and for all.

Bg_Line1:
{不同于拉法叶拥有的治愈能力，米娅的羽翼几乎对伤口起不了任何作用。
拉法叶离开的前几天找过米娅。}
Bg_Line2:
{“米娅，我要出去闯荡了，你和我一起吗？你那么厉害一定可以解救更多的人。”
“我现在还不能走，兽人族看似风平浪静，但你知道的，封印日渐松动，迪布克组织再次现世，克丽奥娜长老又退隐已久，我有一种预感，瓦妮莎会对族人不利，若真是如此，我要留下保护大家安全。”米娅神情凝重，目光却十分坚定。}
Bg_Line3:
{“好吧，米娅，尊重你的选择，但如果有危险请务必书信给我。”
米娅非常珍惜与族人一起生活的日子，她不相信外面世界的争斗可以完全不影响兽人族的生活，世界是相互关联的，只是战火暂时还没烧到这里。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Unlike Lafayette's healing abilities, Mia's wings had almost no effect on wounds.
A few days before Lafayette left, she visited Mia.
Bg_Line2_en:
"Mia, I'm going out to explore the world. Will you come with me? You're so powerful, you could definitely save more people."
"I can't leave yet. The beastmen seem peaceful, but you know, the seal is weakening day by day, the Dibuk organization has reappeared, and Elder Cliodna has long since retired. I have a feeling Vanessa will harm our people. If that's the case, I need to stay and protect everyone." Mia's expression was serious, but her gaze was firm.
Bg_Line3_en:
"Alright, Mia, I respect your choice, but if there's any danger, please be sure to send me a letter."
Mia cherished the days spent living with her tribe. She didn't believe that the conflicts of the outside world wouldn't affect the beastmen's lives. The world is interconnected, and it's just that the flames of war haven't reached here yet.

Bg_Line1:
{所有孩子中，族长最偏爱大女儿瓦妮莎。
她有过人的天赋，别的孩子一个星期才能勉强学会的魔法，她不到一天就能灵活运用，优越的出身和超高的智商给了她骄傲的资本。}
Bg_Line3:
{那么不去在意别人的感受了，那么不去为了满足别人的期待而浪费自己的时间，她决定去做自己，或许这可以让她有不一样的人生。
她盯上了迪布克组织。}
Bg_Line4: {相传，瓦妮莎来的那天天空飘着蒙蒙细雨，一袭黑色小旗袍风华绝代，而雨过天晴后，城镇焕发出新的光彩，过往被雨水冲刷，全新的迪布克组织诞生了。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Among all the children, the clan leader favored his eldest daughter, Vanessa, the most.
She possessed extraordinary talent. While other children struggled to learn a spell in a week, she could master it in less than a day. Her privileged background and exceptional intelligence gave her reason to be proud.
Bg_Line2_en:
She gradually distanced herself from the tribe, weary of beastmen her age who couldn't match her excellence and resentful of her father's repetitive teachings.
Until one day, her father's harsh slap completely awakened the beast sleeping within Vanessa.
She knew they might never understand.
Bg_Line3_en:
So she stopped caring about others' feelings, stopped wasting her time trying to meet their expectations, and decided to be herself. Perhaps this would lead her to a different life.
She set her sights on the Dibuk organization.
Bg_Line4_en: Legend has it that on the day Vanessa arrived, a light drizzle fell from the sky. Dressed in a stunning black cheongsam, she looked peerlessly elegant. After the rain cleared, the town took on a new radiance, as if the past had been washed away by the rain, and a new Dibuk organization was born.

Bg_Line1:
{月色下的小巷一片狼藉，空气中充斥着战斗过的味道，幼狼蜷缩在角落瑟瑟发抖，双眼警惕地感知着周遭的一切。
“有人？”
一个女声从巴托里背靠的墙上方传出，她屏住呼吸，极力控制自己不要发出响动，然而那人轻轻一跃便跳到了她面前。
“活的？狼？”}
Bg_Line4: {那以后须佐真希又收留了她一段时间，直到巴托里提出要去外面继续修行的想法，临别之际须佐真希将那把珍藏已久的“风煞”送给了巴托里，之后巴托里再也没见过须佐真希，但她相信她们很快就会再见了。}
Bg_Line1_en:
The moonlit alley was in complete disarray, the air thick with the scent of battle. A young wolf cub huddled trembling in the corner, its eyes warily scanning its surroundings.
"Someone there?"
A woman's voice came from above the wall Batory was leaning against. Holding her breath, she tried desperately not to make a sound, but the figure leaped down lightly and landed right before her.
"Alive? A wolf?"
Bg_Line2_en:
Batory's fur stood on end. The previous battle had left her completely exhausted, and all she could do was stare motionlessly at the stranger with her emerald-green eyes. Contrary to her expectations, the girl made no move to harm her. Several minutes of silent staring passed until, convinced of the girl's lack of hostile intent, Batory's consciousness gradually faded, and she finally collapsed into unconsciousness.
When she awoke, her wounds had been bandaged. Looking around, Batory noticed numerous katana displayed in the room. Drawn by curiosity, she approached one of them, only to be sharply interrupted just as she reached out to touch it.
"Don't touch."
Bg_Line3_en:
Batory looked toward the girl at the doorway and stiffened, immediately on high alert.
"Were you the one fighting those three people last night?"
The little creature remained tense, muttering incomprehensibly under its breath.
Bg_Line4_en: After that, SusaMaki took her in for some time, until Batory expressed her wish to continue her training elsewhere. At their parting, SusaMaki gifted Batory the long-cherished "Wind Calamity" blade. Though Batory never saw SusaMaki again after that, she believed they would meet again soon.

Bg_Line1:
{冷血，强大，没有谁比佐伊更适合成为守夜人，她喜欢出没在黑夜中，那是最好的伪装。
半月前，铸刀世家须佐一脉家主锻造出了绝世妖刀彼岸，一夜间所有势力都在觊觎，虽然奥尔露恩本身是没什么兴趣的，但总有雇主愿意开出高额报酬，任务顺理成章地落在了佐伊身上。}
Bg_Line2: {佐伊来到须佐家宅的时候，这里已是一片狼藉，她花了整整三天时间才追踪到须佐真希的足迹，少女比她想象得更厉害一些，妖刀的力量渐渐跟少女融为一体，缠斗持续了一夜，破晓时还是被少女逃脱了。}
Bg_Line4:
{佐伊紧握刀柄的手缓缓松弛，她明白奥尔露恩的意思，雇主负责给出报酬，她负责办事，其他的，她不该管。
既然任务没有了执行下去的必要，还是先给自己放个假吧，那女孩下手可真不比自己轻。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Cold-blooded and powerful, no one is more suited to be a night watcher than Zoe. She enjoys lurking in the darkness, as it is the best disguise.
Half a month ago, the head of the Susa swordsmithing family forged the peerless demon sword Higan. Overnight, all factions coveted it. Although Olrun herself had little interest, there were always employers willing to offer high rewards, and the task naturally fell to Zoe.
Bg_Line2_en: When Zoe arrived at the Susa family estate, it was already in chaos. It took her three full days to track down SusaMaki's trail. The girl was more formidable than she had imagined, and the power of the demon sword gradually merged with her. The fierce battle lasted all night, but at dawn, the girl still managed to escape.
Bg_Line3_en:
"So, the demon sword has accepted SusaMaki? What a pity. Now I have to think carefully about whether to continue the mission," Olrun said, nibbling on her left index finger, visibly conflicted.
"I can find her."
"Mhm, of course. But Zoe, after some time, her compatibility with the demon sword will be even higher. Even if you defeat her, the sword won't be what the employer wants anymore. What do you think?"
Bg_Line4_en:
Zoe's grip on the hilt slowly loosened. She understood what Olrun meant—the employer was responsible for providing the reward, and she was responsible for getting the job done. The rest was none of her concern.
Since there was no need to continue the mission, she might as well take a break. That girl's strikes were no lighter than her own.

Bg_Line3: {达比异常粘人，特别是粘她，这让达菲烦恼不已。因为在父母的要求下，她不得不每天多花很多时间陪达比玩一些无聊的游戏。}
Bg_Line4: {当然，达比偶尔也有很可爱的时候。比如会把心心念念的糖果给姐姐留一份，新买的玩具也会先给姐姐玩，尽管达菲并不喜欢玩这些粉哒哒只有小女生才喜欢玩的东西。}
Bg_Line1_en: Duffy, who is deeply influenced by Darby, really can't stand children. Duffy still remembers the day when her parents suddenly brought the young Darby in front of her. Darby looked chubby, pink, and kind of cute. But for a long time after that, Duffy's world was never quiet again.
Bg_Line2_en:
"Hey, I'm saying, can you stop following me? Are you a little tag - along?"
The young Darby couldn't understand what her sister was saying at all. She staggered along behind her sister and said with effort as she walked, "Sis... ter, hug."
Duffy sighed and shook her head. Finally, she helplessly poked Darby's chubby cheek and then picked up the little girl.
Bg_Line3_en: Darby is extremely clingy, especially to her, which troubles Duffy a great deal. Because at the request of their parents, she has to spend a lot more time every day accompanying Darby to play some boring games.
Bg_Line4_en: Of course, Darby can be really cute sometimes. For example, she would save a portion of her favorite candies for her sister and let her sister play with her newly - bought toys first. Even though Duffy doesn't like to play with these pink things that only little girls would love.

Bg_Line1: {作为赤精灵的伊丽丝，她喜欢在夜晚的森林中漫步，感受着大自然的神秘与宁静。她的脚步轻盈，仿佛与大地融为一体，而她的目光则穿透黑暗，洞察着森林中每一丝生命的脉动。}
Bg_Line2: {在她的世界里，每一片叶子都有它的故事，每一朵花都有它的秘密。她对自然充满了热爱与敬畏，与森林中的生灵建立了深厚的友谊。}
Bg_Line3: {在她看来，赤精灵作为高等生物，应该更加注重自身的修养和品行，而不是像野兽一般放纵自己的本能。}
Bg_Line4: {然而，莉莉丝的行为却如同一根刺，深深扎入她的心中。莉莉丝放纵本能，沉溺于欲望，甚至以猎杀森林生灵为乐。这让伊丽丝感受到一种深深的耻辱。}
Bg_Line1_en: As a Red Elf, Iris likes to wander in the forest at night, feeling the mystery and tranquility of nature. Her steps are light, as if she were one with the earth, and her gaze penetrates the darkness, perceiving every faint pulse of life in the forest.
Bg_Line2_en: In her world, every leaf has its own story, and every flower has its own secret. She is full of love and reverence for nature, and has established deep friendships with the creatures in the forest.
Bg_Line3_en: In her opinion, as a superior being, the Red Elf should pay more attention to self - cultivation and moral conduct, rather than indulging in their instincts like wild beasts.
Bg_Line4_en: However, Lilith's behavior was like a thorn, piercing deeply into her heart. Lilith indulged her instincts, wallowed in desires, and even took pleasure in hunting and killing the creatures in the forest. This made Iris feel a deep sense of shame.

Bg_Line1:
{所以，我终究是多余的存在吗？
普奥娜不知道自己生在何地，她对童年唯一的记忆就是，那年在林间，奥尔露恩对她笑，告诉她：“别怕，你以后有家了。”}
Bg_Line2: {奥尔露恩最初对年幼的她甚是宠溺，可伴随她的日渐成熟，她也发现了奥尔露恩的秘密。和其他被收养的孩子一样，普奥娜也被要求训练正慢慢觉醒的精灵力。可普奥娜似乎并没有天赋，进而奥尔露恩对她也日益冷淡下去，甚至是嫌弃。}
Bg_Line3: {她为家里做了更多的事情，每天任劳任怨做着清洁、浇花、做饭，可这些琐事从来不能让奥尔露恩再多看她一眼，她终究是失去了宠爱。她被奥尔露恩派去做一些不合规矩的事情，可又总是因为难以违背良心而不听奥尔露恩的命令，她知道总有一天奥尔露恩会发现的。}
Bg_Line4: {深夜，她坐在房顶，困扰着：所以，我对奥尔露恩来说，只是个不完美的工具吗？那过去的一切都是幻影吗？}
Bg_Line1_en:
"So, am I ultimately just an unnecessary existence?"
Puona didn't know where she was born. Her only childhood memory was that year in the woods, when Olrun smiled at her and said, "Don't be afraid, you have a home now."
Bg_Line2_en: Olrun had initially doted on her when she was young, but as Puona gradually matured, she discovered Olrun's secret. Like other adopted children, Puona was also required to train her slowly awakening spirit power. However, Puona seemed to lack talent, and consequently, Olrun grew increasingly cold toward her, even showing disdain.
Bg_Line3_en: She took on more household chores, dutifully cleaning, watering plants, and cooking every day without complaint. Yet these trivial tasks never earned her another glance from Olrun. In the end, she had lost that cherished affection. Olrun began assigning her improper tasks, but she could never bring herself to follow those orders, unable to go against her conscience. She knew Olrun would discover this one day.
Bg_Line4_en: Late at night, she sat on the rooftop, tormented by thoughts: "So, to Olrun, am I just an imperfect tool? Was everything in the past merely an illusion?"

Bg_Line1: {在冰雪之境，生存是一种艰难的考验。这里的气温极低，寒风凛冽，大地被厚厚的积雪覆盖，仿佛每一个呼吸都在与死神抗争。蛮族和魔物在此肆虐，它们贪婪无度，无情地吞噬着一切生命。}
Bg_Line2:
{很不幸的是就有这么一个孩子，她的爸爸妈妈相继被放逐，只为把她藏在一个安全的地方。
达比从未忘记那个寒冷的夜晚，篝火的温暖将她从绝望中拯救。}
Bg_Line3:
{火光映照在她的脸上，给她带来了一丝温暖和希望。
在那些艰难的日子里，达比记得达菲将她抱在怀里的感觉。达菲是她的守护者，也是她的依靠。}
Bg_Line4: {那种安全感让她相信，无论世界多么残酷，她都有一个可以依靠的人。达菲用她的爱和勇气，给了达比力量，让她在困境中坚持下来。}
Bg_Line1_en: In the Realm of Ice and Snow, survival is a difficult test. The temperature here is extremely low, the cold wind howls fiercely, and the land is covered with thick snow. It seems that every breath is a struggle against death. Barbarians and monsters run wild here. They are insatiably greedy and mercilessly devour all life.
Bg_Line2_en: Unfortunately, there is such a child. Her parents were successively exiled, all just to hide her in a safe place. Darby has never forgotten that cold night. The warmth of the campfire rescued her from despair.
Bg_Line3_en: The light of the fire shone on her face, bringing her a little warmth and hope. In those difficult days, Darby remembered the feeling of Duffy holding her in her arms. Duffy was her protector and her support.
Bg_Line4_en: That sense of security made her believe that no matter how cruel the world was, she had someone to rely on. With her love and courage, Duffy gave Darby the strength to persevere in the face of difficulties.

Bg_Line1: {封灵碑的灵力波动愈发强烈，整个大地似乎都在为之颤动。尤缇迦，这位时之祭司，自五百年前继承那份神秘魔力以来，便背负起了沉重的责任。}
Bg_Line2: {她的心灵时常被天象的异动所扰，那些诡异的光芒和闪烁的星辰，仿佛在预示着她即将面临的重大变革。}
Bg_Line3: {近些日子，尤缇迦更是难以入眠。她被那些噩梦所困扰，那些被大火吞噬的村庄、硝烟弥漫的废墟，仿佛都在她的脑海中不断重现。那些世界毫无生机，充满了死亡和绝望的气息，让她感到无比的压抑和恐惧。}
Bg_Line4: {但即便如此，尤缇迦从未放弃过希望。她深知，神示上的预言并非空穴来风——“封印破，魔物当道，天命轮转，逆世人现，时局变。”这些话语如同一把利剑，时刻提醒着她肩上的重任。她知道，自己必须为那个命定之人的到来做好准备。}
Bg_Line1_en: The spiritual power fluctuations of the Spirit Sealing Monument became increasingly intense, and it seemed as if the entire earth was trembling because of it. Utija, the Time Priestess, has shouldered a heavy responsibility ever since she inherited that mysterious magic power five hundred years ago.
Bg_Line2_en: Her heart is often troubled by the abnormal changes in the celestial phenomena. Those strange lights and twinkling stars seem to be foreshadowing the significant changes she is about to face.
Bg_Line3_en: In recent days, Utija has found it even more difficult to fall asleep. She is haunted by those nightmares. The villages devoured by the raging fire and the ruins filled with billowing smoke seem to keep reappearing in her mind. Those worlds are completely devoid of life, filled with the stench of death and despair, making her feel extremely depressed and terrified.
Bg_Line4_en: Even so, Utija has never given up hope. She is well aware that the prophecy in the divine revelation is not groundless — "When the seal is broken, monsters will rule the world. The cycle of destiny will turn, and those who go against the common will appear, and the situation will change." These words are like a sharp sword, constantly reminding her of the heavy responsibility on her shoulders. She knows that she must be prepared for the arrival of the destined one.

Bg_Line1: {古书上记载，千百年前有有这么一个种族，他们笃信自己离世后的灵魂将依附在肉身上，而灵魂将随着肉体的腐坏逐渐丧失，肉体的彻底毁灭则意味着灵魂的全部消亡。}
Bg_Line2:
{所以，每当有同伴死去，他们就会用白色的绷带将其包裹，在巫师做法后将其封存于棺柩内。
木箱里传来窸窸窣窣的动静，奥尔露恩轻轻戳了一下，里面的响动更大了。}
Bg_Line3:
{结界设置得非常巧妙，但所幸这种结界被记录在了禁书上，而奥尔露恩恰好研读过。
少女坐了起来，金色的瞳孔直愣愣地看着奥尔露恩，仿佛在审视什么。}
Bg_Line4:
{“比我想象得更惊喜，你就是审判者帕特拉？”
“你，犯什么错了吗？”
奥尔露恩笑了笑：“我可是遵守秩序的良民，绝对秩序才会带来世界的绝对稳定，有兴趣加入“鸩”吗？”
少女张了张嘴，缓缓发出声音：“好。”}
Bg_Line1_en: According to ancient books, thousands of years ago, there was such a race. They firmly believed that after their death, their souls would be attached to their physical bodies, and the souls would gradually be lost as the bodies decayed. The complete destruction of the body meant the total disappearance of the soul.
Bg_Line2_en:
Therefore, whenever a companion died, they would wrap the body in white bandages and seal it in a coffin after the shaman performed rituals.
A rustling sound came from the wooden box. Orlun gently poked it, and the noise inside grew louder.
Bg_Line3_en:
The enchantment barrier was set up very ingeniously. Fortunately, this kind of enchantment barrier was recorded in the forbidden book, and Orluen happened to have studied it.
The girl sat up, and her golden pupils stared straight at Orluen as if she were scrutinizing something.
Bg_Line4_en:
"It's more of a pleasant surprise than I expected. Are you the Judge, Patra?"
"You, have you committed any mistakes?"
Olrun smiled and said, "I'm a law-abiding citizen. Absolute order will bring absolute stability to the world. Are you interested in joining the 'Poisonous Vulture'?"
The girl opened her mouth and slowly said, "Okay."

Bg_Line1: {辛开始尝试在使命之外寻找答案。她独自漫步在荒野中，感受风的气息，聆听大地的低语。她发现，世界并非只有秩序与责任，还有无数细微的美好。}
Bg_Line2: {她开始思考，自己的力量究竟能为世界带来什么。她不再将使命视为一种负担，而是将其视为一种探索。每一次施展魔法，她都会思考其中的意义；每一次完成任务，她都会反思自己的初衷。}
Bg_Line3: {她逐渐明白，真正的强大并非仅仅是为了维持秩序，而是为了在秩序中找到属于自己的位置。}
Bg_Line1_en: Shin began to seek answers beyond her mission. She wandered alone in the wilderness, feeling the breath of the wind and listening to the whispers of the earth. She discovered that the world is not just about order and duty, but also countless subtle beauties.
Bg_Line2_en: She began to ponder what her power could truly bring to the world. She no longer saw her mission as a burden, but rather as an exploration. Every time she cast a spell, she contemplated its meaning; every time she completed a task, she reflected on her original intentions.
Bg_Line3_en: She gradually came to understand that true strength is not merely about maintaining order, but about finding her own place within that order.

Bg_Line1: {克丽奥娜开始期待海芙约特的下一次挑战，甚至偶尔会主动指点海芙约特几招。尽管克丽奥娜依旧保持着冷淡的外表，但她的内心却逐渐被海芙约特的热情所感染。}
Bg_Line2: {克丽奥娜明白，自己的力量与地位让她注定孤独，但海芙约特的存在让她感受到了一种久违的温暖。}
Bg_Line3: {克丽奥娜开始思考，或许漫长的生命并非只有无聊与冷漠，还有像海芙约特这样的光芒，能够照亮她的世界。尽管她从未说出口，但她的心中已悄然将海芙约特视为一种特别的存在。}
Bg_Line1_en: Cliodna began to look forward to Herfjotur's next challenge, and even occasionally took the initiative to give Herfjotur a few pointers. Although Cliodna still maintained her cold exterior, her heart was gradually warmed by Herfjotur's enthusiasm.
Bg_Line2_en: Cliodna understood that her power and status destined her to be lonely, but Herfjotur's presence brought her a long-lost sense of warmth.
Bg_Line3_en: Cliodna began to ponder that perhaps a long life was not just filled with boredom and indifference. There were also lights like Herfjotur, capable of illuminating her world. Although she never voiced it, her heart had quietly come to regard Herfjotur as a special presence.

Bg_Line1: {德莉法站在魔法学院的露台上，感受着风在指尖流动。妹妹抱着一本厚重的魔法书跑来，金色的发丝在阳光下闪耀。"姐姐，我找到了让花朵永不凋谢的魔法！"她兴奋地说。}
Bg_Line2: {德莉法握住妹妹的手，引导她感受魔力。她们一起念出咒语，野花的花瓣泛起微光，变得更加鲜艳。妹妹惊喜地叫出声，笑容灿烂。}
Bg_Line3: {看着妹妹的笑脸，德莉法心中温暖。她变强的理由从来都不是为了征服，而是为了守护这一刻的纯真与快乐。风继续吹拂，带着淡淡的花香，德莉法想，这就是她想要的幸福。}
Bg_Line1_en: Derifa stood on the balcony of the magic academy, feeling the wind flow through her fingertips. Her younger sister came running, holding a thick magic book, her golden hair shimmering in the sunlight. "Sister, I found a spell to make flowers never wither!" she exclaimed excitedly.
Bg_Line2_en: Derifa held her sister's hand, guiding her to feel the magic. Together, they chanted the spell, and the petals of the wildflowers glowed faintly, becoming more vibrant. Her sister let out a cry of delight, her smile radiant.
Bg_Line3_en: Looking at her sister's smiling face, Derifa felt warmth in her heart. The reason she sought to become stronger was never to conquer, but to protect this moment of innocence and joy. The wind continued to blow, carrying a faint scent of flowers, and Derifa thought, this was the happiness she had always wanted.

Bg_Line1:
{忒菲丝站在乌米伽最奢华的舞厅中央，水晶吊灯的光芒洒在她鲜红的长裙上。乐声响起，她轻轻闭上眼睛，任由身体随着记忆中的韵律舞动。
她能感觉到台下炙热的目光，那些王公贵族们渴望的眼神。她的舞步渐渐加快，裙摆飞扬，仿佛一朵绽放的玫瑰。空气中开始泛起淡淡的光晕，那是她编织的幻境正在成形。}
Bg_Line2: {突然，她在旋转中瞥见一个身影——一个身着铁甲的高大男子站在角落，冷峻的面容上没有一丝波动。忒菲丝的心猛地一跳，舞步险些乱了节奏。她从未见过有人能在她的幻境中保持清醒。}
Bg_Line3: {舞曲结束，忒菲丝微微喘息着行礼。当她再次抬头时，铁甲将军已经消失不见，只在原地留下一片闪着微光的铁屑。她蹲下身，指尖轻轻触碰那些铁屑，一股熟悉的寒意顺着指尖蔓延。}
Bg_Line4: {或许，这就是她寻找已久的线索。忒菲丝握紧手中的铁屑，决定追寻那个神秘的身影。无论前方有什么在等待，她都要找回失去的记忆，即使那可能是一个她不愿面对的真相。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Thefis stood in the center of the most luxurious ballroom in Umiga, the light from the crystal chandelier spilling over her crimson gown. As the music began, she gently closed her eyes, letting her body move to the rhythm of her memories.
She could feel the intense gazes from the audience, the longing looks of the nobles and royals. Her steps gradually quickened, her skirt swirling like a blooming rose. A faint glow began to shimmer in the air, the illusions she wove taking shape.
Bg_Line2_en: Suddenly, during a spin, she caught sight of a figure—a tall man clad in iron armor standing in the corner, his stern face showing no emotion. Thefis's heart skipped a beat, and her steps nearly faltered. She had never seen anyone remain unaffected in her illusions.
Bg_Line3_en: As the dance ended, Thefis bowed slightly, catching her breath. When she looked up again, Crocodile had vanished, leaving only a scattering of faintly glowing iron dust in his place. She crouched down, her fingertips lightly brushing the dust, a familiar chill spreading through her fingers.
Bg_Line4_en: Perhaps, this was the clue she had been searching for all along. Thefis clenched the iron dust in her hand, determined to pursue that mysterious figure. No matter what lay ahead, she was resolved to reclaim her lost memories, even if it meant facing a truth she might not want to confront.

Bg_Line1: {厄洛丝独自站在空荡的练习室，月光洒在她身上。她轻轻哼唱，指尖泛起微光，光点在空中舞动。这是她真正的力量，与甜美外表截然不同的力量。}
Bg_Line2: {"所有人都爱着这个虚假的我，"她对着镜子低语。镜中的少女有着完美的笑容，但眼神深处藏着孤独。她伸手触碰镜面，光芒流转。}
Bg_Line3: {厄洛丝转身离开，留下一室寂静。她知道，明天的太阳升起时，她又会是那个人人喜爱的完美偶像。只有这深夜的月光，才照见真实的自己。}
Bg_Line1_en: Eros stood alone in the empty practice room, moonlight spilling over her. She hummed softly, her fingertips glowing faintly as points of light danced in the air. This was her true power, a force starkly different from her sweet exterior.
Bg_Line2_en: "Everyone loves this false version of me," she whispered to the mirror. The girl in the reflection wore a perfect smile, but deep in her eyes lay loneliness. She reached out to touch the mirror, light swirling around her fingertips.
Bg_Line3_en: Eros turned and left, leaving behind a room filled with silence. She knew that when the sun rose tomorrow, she would once again be the perfect idol beloved by everyone. Only the moonlight of this deep night could reveal her true self.

Bg_Line1: {斯莉德在月光下的森林中穿行，银发在夜风中轻扬。一阵啜泣声引起了她的注意，她发现一个受伤的小精灵蜷缩在树根旁，翅膀破碎，浑身是血。}
Bg_Line2: {小精灵惊恐地看着她："别过来！"斯莉德沉默片刻，取出一瓶药剂递过去："喝了它，能止痛。"小精灵犹豫着接过，喝下后脸色好了许多。}
Bg_Line3: {"为什么帮我？"小精灵怯生生地问。斯莉德没有回答，只是站起身准备离开。她也不知道为什么，或许是小精灵眼中的恐惧触动了她。}
Bg_Line4: {"谢谢你。"小精灵的声音从身后传来。斯莉德脚步一顿，月光下，她的嘴角微微上扬。这一刻，她似乎找到了比战斗更有意义的事。}
Bg_Line1_en: Slider walked through the moonlit forest, her silver hair fluttering in the night breeze. A faint sob caught her attention, and she discovered an injured little elf curled up by the roots of a tree, its wings shattered and body covered in blood.
Bg_Line2_en: The little elf looked at her in fear: "Stay away!" Slider paused for a moment, then took out a potion and handed it over: "Drink this, it will ease the pain." The little elf hesitated but took it, and after drinking, its complexion improved significantly.
Bg_Line3_en: "Why are you helping me?" the little elf asked timidly. Slider didn't answer, simply standing up to leave. She didn't know why either—perhaps it was the fear in the little elf's eyes that had moved her.
Bg_Line4_en: "Thank you," the little elf's voice came from behind. Slider paused her steps, and under the moonlight, the corners of her lips lifted slightly. In that moment, it seemed she had found something more meaningful than battle.

Bg_Line2:
{“146、147、148——”
“缪西卡大人，尤缇迦大人说你可能在这儿，我就过来了。”
“149、150——”
没有得到回应的克罗洛丝声音越来越小：“我……我今天跟尤缇迦大人学习了新的时间魔法，她说……她说可以多找你玩的。”}
Bg_Line3:
{克罗洛丝紧张得攥紧了拳头，见缪西卡没有反应便弯腰摘下一朵鸢尾。
“喏，你摸摸它试试。”
缪西卡有些犹豫，她今天没有戴手套。
“一下，就一下好吗？”
缪西卡试探着碰了碰，不出所料，鸢尾在瞬间枯萎，克罗洛丝微笑着将鸢尾捧于掌心然后默念咒语，花朵渐渐恢复到之前盛放的样子，虽然只维持了短短5分钟。}
Bg_Line4:
{“对…对不起，我现在的力量还不够，等我以后厉害了，它一定还可以开好久好久。”
缪西卡面无表情地看着漫空飞舞的萤火虫，将双手背在身后，说道：“那就拜托你了。”}
Bg_Line1_en:
"Lady Mousika is here. Let's go."
Humans always avoid Mousika as if she were a plague, even though she is one of the Four Holy Maidens.
The irises are in bloom, and a faint, delicate fragrance drifts in the wind. Mousika is sitting alone on a swing hanging from a tree branch, enjoying the moonlight while counting the fireflies.
Bg_Line2_en:
"146, 147, 148—"
"Lady Mousika, Lady Utija said you might be here, so I came over."
"149, 150—"
Without getting a response, Crolos's voice became softer and softer. "I... I learned a new time magic from Lady Utija today. She said... she said I could come and play with you more often."
Bg_Line3_en:
Crolos clenched her fists nervously, and seeing that Mousika didn't react, she bent down to pick an iris.
"Here, try touching it."
Mousika hesitated; she wasn't wearing gloves today.
"Just once, okay?"
Mousika tentatively touched it, and as expected, the iris withered instantly. Crolos smiled, cradled the iris in her palm, and silently chanted a spell. The flower gradually returned to its previous blooming state, though it only lasted for a brief five minutes.
Bg_Line4_en:
"I'm... I'm sorry, my strength isn't enough right now. When I become stronger in the future, it will definitely last much, much longer."
Mousika looked expressionlessly at the fireflies dancing in the sky, her hands behind her back, and said, "Then I'll count on you."

Bg_Line1: {罗兰的内心深处，始终怀揣着一个愿望——希望有一天，世界不再需要圣骑士团的守护，人们能够和平共处，魔物的威胁也能彻底消失。}
Bg_Line2: {尽管罗兰知道这个愿望或许遥不可及，但她从未放弃过努力。每一次挥剑，每一次决策，都是为了离这个目标更近一步。}
Bg_Line3: {而在那些独处的时刻，当她站在城墙之上，眺望远方的地平线时，她的心中总会涌起一股莫名的力量。那是信念的力量，也是希望的力量。}
Bg_Line4: {她知道，无论前路多么艰难，她都会继续前行，因为她不仅是圣骑士团的灵魂，更是无数人心中的光。}
Bg_Line1_en: Deep in Roland's heart, she always held onto a wish—that one day, the world would no longer need the protection of the Holy Knights, people could coexist peacefully, and the threat of monsters would vanish completely.
Bg_Line2_en: Although Roland knew this wish might be far out of reach, she never gave up striving. Every swing of her sword, every decision she made, was a step closer to that goal.
Bg_Line3_en: In those moments of solitude, when she stood atop the city walls, gazing at the distant horizon, a strange power would always surge within her heart. It was the power of faith, and the power of hope.
Bg_Line4_en: She knew that no matter how difficult the road ahead might be, she would continue to move forward, for she was not only the soul of the Holy Knights but also the light in the hearts of countless people.

Bg_Line1: {夜色如墨，古里拉河的流水声在寂静中格外清晰。须佐真希独自走在河畔，手中的妖刀“彼岸”在月光下泛着冷冽的光。她的心并不平静，脑海中不断浮现出家族的宿命与责任。}
Bg_Line2: {为了寻找答案，她决定前往古里拉河上游的废弃神社，那里曾是须佐一族供奉先祖的地方，或许藏着她必须面对的真相。}
Bg_Line3: {穿过密林，神社的轮廓渐渐显现。破败的鸟居和布满青苔的石阶诉说着岁月的沧桑。她推开腐朽的木门，目光落在中央的石碑上。刻着的秘文写道：“彼岸觉醒之日，须佐血脉将迎来终结。”她握紧刀柄，心中寒意骤起，意识到自己肩负着无法逃避的命运。}
Bg_Line4: {站在神社中，须佐真希深吸一口气，知道自己已无退路。无论前方是毁灭还是新生，她都必须走下去。夜色深沉，古里拉河的流水声依旧潺潺，仿佛在诉说着无声的哀伤。她的身影渐渐消失在夜色中，只留下一片寂静与谜团。}
Bg_Line1_en: The night was as dark as ink, and the sound of the Kurila River's flowing water was particularly clear in the silence. SusaMaki walked alone by the riverside, the demon sword "Higan" in her hand gleaming coldly under the moonlight. Her heart was anything but calm, as the weight of her family's destiny and responsibilities constantly surfaced in her mind.
Bg_Line2_en: In search of answers, she decided to head to the abandoned shrine upstream of the Kurila River. It was once a place where the Susa clan honored their ancestors, and perhaps it held the truth she needed to face.
Bg_Line3_en: As she passed through the dense forest, the outline of the shrine gradually came into view. The dilapidated torii gate and moss-covered stone steps spoke of the passage of time. She pushed open the rotting wooden door, her gaze falling on the central stone monument. The cryptic inscription read: "On the day Higan awakens, the bloodline of Susa shall meet its end." She gripped the hilt of her sword, a chill running through her heart as she realized she bore an inescapable destiny.
Bg_Line4_en: Standing in the shrine, SusaMaki took a deep breath, knowing there was no turning back. Whether ahead lay destruction or rebirth, she had to press on. The night was deep, and the sound of the Kurila River's flowing water continued to murmur, as if whispering silent sorrow. Her figure gradually faded into the night, leaving behind only silence and mystery.

Bg_Line1:
{夕阳西下，克图格亚站在教堂的彩绘玻璃窗前，金色的长发在余晖中闪耀。她轻轻抚摸着胸前的蓝色宝石，眼神中闪过一丝不易察觉的锐利。
"圣女大人，"修女轻声提醒，"该准备晚祷了。"}
Bg_Line2:
{克图格亚转过身，露出温和的微笑："好的，我这就来。"她优雅地整理了一下长裙的褶皱，缓步走向礼拜堂。每一步都恰到好处，完美得仿佛经过精心计算。
晚祷结束后，克图格亚独自来到教堂的地下室。她点燃一支蜡烛，脱下华丽的长裙，换上的黑色劲装。}
Bg_Line3: {"真是讽刺，"她轻声自语，"那些虔诚的信徒们，可曾想过他们崇拜的圣女，每晚都会在这里练习格斗技巧？"}
Bg_Line4: {蜡烛燃尽，克图格亚重新换上圣女的装束。走出地下室时，她又变回了那个温柔可亲的圣女，仿佛刚才的一切都只是幻觉。但只有她自己知道，这份伪装下藏着怎样真实的自己。}
Bg_Line1_en:
As the sun set, Cthugha stood before the stained glass window of the church, her golden hair shimmering in the fading light. She gently touched the blue gemstone on her chest, a sharp glint flashing in her eyes, almost imperceptible.
"Saintess," the nun softly reminded, "it's time to prepare for evening prayers."
Bg_Line2_en:
Cthugha turned around, offering a gentle smile. "Alright, I'll be right there." She gracefully smoothed the folds of her long dress and walked slowly toward the chapel. Every step was precise, as if perfectly calculated.
After the evening prayers, Cthugha went alone to the church's basement. She lit a candle, removed her elegant dress, and changed into a sleek black outfit.
Bg_Line3_en: "How ironic," she murmured to herself. "Have those devout believers ever imagined that the saintess they worship practices combat skills here every night?"
Bg_Line4_en: As the candle burned out, Cthugha changed back into her saintess attire. When she stepped out of the basement, she had once again become the gentle and kind saintess, as if everything that had just happened was an illusion. But only she knew the true self hidden beneath this disguise.

Bg_Line1:
{荒的离去并没有让兽人族的议论平息，反而让她的传说更加神秘。族人们开始将她的出现与族中的重大事件联系在一起，试图从中找到某种规律。
然而，荒的行踪始终如风般难以捉摸，她的每一次出现都像是命运的刻意安排，却又毫无预兆。}
Bg_Line2: {几年后，兽人族遭遇了一场前所未有的灾难——一种诡异的瘟疫在族中蔓延，族长和众多族人倒下。族内陷入绝望之际，荒的身影再次现身于村口。她挥动九条尾巴，洒下一片柔和的光芒。那些被瘟疫折磨的族人在这光芒中逐渐恢复了健康，而荒的身影也再次悄然消失。}
Bg_Line3: {这一次，族人们对荒的敬畏达到了顶点。他们开始为她修建祭坛，每年举行仪式，祈求她的庇佑。}
Bg_Line4: {然而，荒从未在仪式上现身，她的存在更像是一种象征，一种超越现实的力量。而她所追寻的秘密，或许只有时间才能揭晓。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Susabi's departure did not quell the discussions among the beastmen; instead, it made her legend even more mysterious. The clan members began to link her appearances with significant events in the tribe, trying to find some pattern.
However, Susabi's whereabouts remained as elusive as the wind. Each of her appearances seemed like a deliberate act of fate, yet they came without warning.
Bg_Line2_en: A few years later, the beastmen faced an unprecedented disaster—a strange plague spread through the tribe, causing the clan leader and many members to fall ill. As despair gripped the tribe, Susabi's figure once again appeared at the village entrance. She waved her nine tails, casting a gentle light. Those afflicted by the plague gradually recovered under this radiance, and Susabi's figure quietly vanished once more.
Bg_Line3_en: This time, the tribe's reverence for Susabi reached its peak. They began to build an altar in her honor, holding annual ceremonies to pray for her protection.
Bg_Line4_en: However, Susabi never appeared at the ceremonies. Her existence was more like a symbol, a force that transcended reality. And the secrets she sought might only be revealed by time.

Bg_Line1: {拉法叶站在圣骑士团的疗愈大厅中，手中的羽毛散发着柔和的光芒。她轻轻一挥，骑士的伤口便迅速愈合，连疤痕都没有留下。这是她成为第六骑士后的日常，用羽毛的力量治愈了许多人。然而，她的心中始终有一个缺口——那片森林，还有那个总是睡眼惺忪的巴斯特。}
Bg_Line2: {夜晚，拉法叶独自坐在花园中，握着羽毛发呆。克丽奥娜长老在她临走前说的话在心中回荡：“治愈不仅仅是修复伤口，还包括治愈人心。如果感到迷茫，就回来看看。”拉法叶愣住了，心中涌起一股强烈的渴望。}
Bg_Line3: {一切结束后，拉法叶回到了森林。她走近小木屋，看到巴斯特依旧懒洋洋地趴在门口，眼睛半睁半闭。“你回来了啊。”巴斯特的声音懒洋洋的，仿佛拉法叶从未离开过。拉法叶笑了，点上一支木香，坐在她身边。}
Bg_Line4: {月光洒在小木屋上，拉法叶轻声讲起了故事。她知道，自己终于找到了真正的治愈——不仅是治愈他人，也是治愈自己。}
Bg_Line1_en: Lafayette stood in the healing hall of the Holy Knights, a soft glow emanating from the feather in her hand. With a gentle wave, the knight's wounds quickly healed, leaving no scars. This had become her daily routine since becoming the sixth knight, using the power of feathers to heal many. Yet, there was always a void in her heart—the forest, and the ever-sleepy Bast.
Bg_Line2_en: At night, Lafayette sat alone in the garden, holding the feather and lost in thought. Elder Cliodna's words before she left echoed in her heart: "Healing is not just about mending wounds, but also about healing hearts. If you feel lost, come back and see." Lafayette froze, a strong longing welling up inside her.
Bg_Line3_en: After everything was over, Lafayette returned to the forest. She approached the small cabin and saw Bast still lazily sprawled at the door, her eyes half-open. "You're back," Bast said in a drowsy voice, as if Lafayette had never left. Lafayette smiled, lit a stick of incense, and sat down beside her.
Bg_Line4_en: Moonlight spilled over the small cabin as Lafayette softly began to tell a story. She knew she had finally found true healing—not just for others, but for herself as well.

Bg_Line1: {“传说她们生活在森林深处，是一种头上长着一只长角、有着美丽的白色毛发的精灵。其性格温和，举止优雅，就像天真无邪的少女一般……”}
Bg_Line2: {贝拉拉看着一本精灵百科全书自言自语道，“唔，独角兽也很吸引人双角兽也很吸引人，怎么办呢……好纠结。算了！小孩子才做选择呢，我~全~都~要！”}
Bg_Line3: {嘭~贝拉拉给自己的头上幻化了3个角并骄傲地挺了挺胸，说道：“这样我作为黑精灵的魅力就大大提升了吧！嘻嘻，我可真聪明呀。”}
Bg_Line1_en: "It is said that they live deep in the forest. They are a kind of elf with a long horn on their heads and beautiful white fur. They have gentle personalities and elegant manners, just like innocent girls..."
Bg_Line2_en: Bellara looked at an elf encyclopedia and muttered to herself, "Hmm, unicorns are attractive, and bicorns are also attractive. What should I do... So conflicted. Forget it! Only kids make choices. I want them all!"
Bg_Line3_en: Boom~Bellara conjured up three horns on her head and proudly puffed out her chest, saying, "In this way, my charm as a dark elf has been greatly enhanced, right! Hehe, I'm so clever."

Bg_Line1: {米娅站在兽人部落的瞭望塔上，黑色的羽翼在夕阳下泛着暗沉的光泽。她望着拉法叶远去的背影，指尖轻轻拂过自己的翅膀。这双无法治愈任何伤口的黑翼，却承载着她守护族人的决心。}
Bg_Line2: {夜幕降临，米娅展开黑色的羽翼，在部落上空盘旋。她能感觉到空气中不安的躁动，封印的力量正在减弱，而迪布克组织的阴影也在悄然逼近。}
Bg_Line3: {"米娅姐姐！"一个小兽人跑过来，手里捧着一束野花，"送给你！"米娅蹲下身，温柔地接过花束。这一刻，她更加确信自己的选择——她要守护这些纯真的笑容，守护这片宁静的土地。}
Bg_Line4: {月光下，米娅的羽翼泛着淡淡的光晕。她知道，自己或许无法像拉法叶那样拯救更多的人，但至少，她要守护好眼前的一切。这是她的责任，也是她的信念。}
Bg_Line1_en: Mia stood on the watchtower of the beastmen tribe, her black wings shimmering with a dull luster under the setting sun. She watched Lafayette's retreating figure, her fingertips gently brushing over her wings. These black wings, unable to heal any wounds, carried her determination to protect her people.
Bg_Line2_en: As night fell, Mia spread her black wings and circled above the tribe. She could sense a restless unease in the air—the power of the seal was weakening, and the shadow of the Dibuk organization was quietly approaching.
Bg_Line3_en: "Sister Mia!" A young beastman ran over, holding a bunch of wildflowers. "This is for you!" Mia crouched down and gently accepted the bouquet. At that moment, she became even more certain of her choice—she would protect these innocent smiles and this peaceful land.
Bg_Line4_en: Under the moonlight, Mia's wings shimmered with a faint glow. She knew she might not be able to save as many people as Lafayette, but at the very least, she would protect everything before her. This was her duty, and her belief.

Bg_Line1: {瓦妮莎站在雨中，黑色旗袍勾勒出优雅的身姿。雨滴滑落，却浇不灭她眼中的野心。她抬头望着迪布克组织的招牌，指尖凝聚着幽蓝色的魔力，如同她内心膨胀的欲望。}
Bg_Line2: {她迈着优雅的步伐走进大门，高跟鞋的声音在大厅回荡。组织成员们纷纷抬头，被这个突然出现的女子所震慑。"从今天起，迪布克组织将迎来新生。"她的声音清脆却威严。}
Bg_Line3: {瓦妮莎抬手，幽蓝色魔力在空中凝聚成巨大的兽爪，那是她内心野兽的具现化。成员们不由自主地低下头，臣服于这股强大的力量。}
Bg_Line4: {雨停了，阳光照在焕然一新的总部。瓦妮莎站在窗前，看着街道上的人群。她知道，这座城市将因她而改变，而她将在这里书写属于自己的传奇。}
Bg_Line1_en: Vanessa stood in the rain, her black cheongsam outlining her elegant figure. The raindrops fell, but they couldn't extinguish the ambition in her eyes. She looked up at the sign of the Dibuk organization, dark blue magic gathering at her fingertips, like the growing desire within her heart.
Bg_Line2_en: She walked through the door with graceful steps, the sound of her high heels echoing through the hall. The members of the organization looked up, stunned by the sudden appearance of this woman. "From today onward, the Dibuk organization will be reborn," her voice was clear yet commanding.
Bg_Line3_en: Vanessa raised her hand, and dark blue magic condensed in the air, forming a massive beastly claw—a manifestation of the beast within her heart. The members involuntarily lowered their heads, submitting to this overwhelming power.
Bg_Line4_en: The rain stopped, and sunlight shone on the revitalized headquarters. Vanessa stood by the window, watching the crowds on the street. She knew this city would change because of her, and here, she would write her own legend.

Bg_Line1: {多年后，巴托里已成为狼族最强大的战士。她手持"风煞"，在月光下巡逻。突然，一阵熟悉的剑气传来，她的心跳陡然加快。}
Bg_Line2: {"好久不见，小家伙。"须佐真希的声音在身后响起。她依旧英姿飒爽，只是眼角多了几道细纹。巴托里激动地喊道："须佐大人！"}
Bg_Line3: {须佐真希走近，轻轻拍了拍她的肩膀："你长大了，也变强了。"她的目光落在"风煞"上，"看来它找到了真正的主人。"}
Bg_Line4: {月光下，两把刀交相辉映。刀光剑影中，巴托里感受到了久违的温暖。她知道，这次重逢不是终点，而是新的开始。}
Bg_Line1_en: Years later, Batory had become the strongest warrior of the wolf clan. Patrolling under the moonlight with "Wind Calamity" in hand, she suddenly sensed a familiar sword aura - her heartbeat quickened instantly.
Bg_Line2_en: "Long time no see, little one." SusaMaki's voice came from behind. She still looked heroic and vigorous, though with a few more fine lines at the corners of her eyes. Batory cried out excitedly, "Lady Susa!"
Bg_Line3_en: SusaMaki stepped closer and gently patted her shoulder: "You've grown up and become stronger." Her gaze fell upon "Wind Calamity", "It seems it has found its true master."
Bg_Line4_en: Under the moonlight, the two blades gleamed in harmony. Amidst the flashing steel, Batory felt a warmth she hadn't known in years. She understood this reunion wasn't an ending, but a new beginning.

Bg_Line1: {佐伊站在月光下，手中的刀泛着冷光。她望着远处的山峦，心中却不再平静。自从与须佐真希一战，她的内心仿佛被什么触动，再也无法回到从前那种冷酷无情的状态。}
Bg_Line2: {某天夜里，佐伊在一座小镇的酒馆中听到了关于须佐真希的传闻。据说，她正在追捕一群盗匪，这些盗匪专门袭击偏远村庄，抢夺财物，伤害无辜。佐伊放下酒杯，眼中闪过一丝复杂的神色。}
Bg_Line3: {她决定前往传闻中的村庄。当她赶到时，正看到须佐真希独自一人与数十名盗匪对峙。妖刀"彼岸"在她手中散发出炽烈的红光，仿佛在回应主人的意志。佐伊没有犹豫，拔出刀，悄无声息地加入了战斗。}
Bg_Line4: {战斗结束后，须佐真希看着佐伊，微微一笑："没想到会在这里见到你。"佐伊收起刀，淡淡道："只是路过。"月光下，两人的影子拉得很长，仿佛在诉说着某种默契。}
Bg_Line1_en: Zoe stood under the moonlight, her blade gleaming coldly in her hand. She gazed at the distant mountains, but her heart was no longer at peace. Ever since the battle with SusaMaki, something within her seemed to have been stirred, and she could no longer return to her former state of cold indifference.
Bg_Line2_en: One night, Zoe heard rumors about SusaMaki in a small town's tavern. It was said that she was hunting a group of bandits who specialized in attacking remote villages, looting property, and harming the innocent. Zoe put down her glass, a complex expression flashing in her eyes.
Bg_Line3_en: She decided to head to the rumored village. When she arrived, she saw SusaMaki standing alone against dozens of bandits. The demon sword "Higan" in her hand emitted a fierce red light, as if responding to its master's will. Without hesitation, Zoe drew her blade and silently joined the fight.
Bg_Line4_en: After the battle, SusaMaki looked at Zoe and smiled slightly. "I didn't expect to see you here." Zoe sheathed her blade and said indifferently, "Just passing by." Under the moonlight, their shadows stretched long, as if speaking of some unspoken understanding.

Bg_Line1: {长大后的达菲选择了加入米娅的军团，她希望世间的生存环境好一点，让这些小孩子永远快乐下去。}
Bg_Line2: {达菲站在军团的训练场上，听见远处传来孩童的嬉闹声，她皱了皱眉。自从加入米娅的军团，她已经很久没有回家，也很久没见到那个总是粘着她的小尾巴——达比。}
Bg_Line3: {一天，军团接到护送难民的任务。达菲在人群中忙碌，突然听到熟悉的声音："姐姐！"她转身，看到达比朝她跑来，脸上带着兴奋的笑容。"我加入了医疗队，"达比骄傲地说，"我想像姐姐一样，帮助需要帮助的人。"}
Bg_Line4: {达菲愣住了。记忆中那个总是粘着她的小女孩，如今已经长大，有了自己的理想。她看着达比忙碌的身影，心中涌起一股暖流。}
Bg_Line1_en: When she grew up, Duffy chose to join Mia's legion. She hoped that the living environment in the world could be better, so that these children could always be happy.
Bg_Line2_en: Duffy stood on the training ground of the legion. Hearing the laughter and playing of children in the distance, she frowned. Since joining Mia's legion, she hadn't been home for a long time, and she also hadn't seen that little tail who was always clinging to her, Darby, for a long time.
Bg_Line3_en: One day, the legion received a mission to escort refugees. Duffy was busy among the crowd when she suddenly heard a familiar voice: "Sister!" She turned around and saw Darby running towards her with an excited smile on her face. "I joined the medical team," Darby said proudly. "I want to be like you, sister, and help those in need."
Bg_Line4_en: Duffy was stunned. The little girl who used to always cling to her in her memory had now grown up and had her own dreams. She watched Darby's busy figure, and a warm current welled up in her heart.

Bg_Line1:
{伊丽丝决定不再沉默。她开始以自己的方式影响族群，用行动证明赤精灵的高贵并非虚名。
她在森林深处建立了一处静谧的居所，邀请那些愿意追随她的赤精灵前来修行。}
Bg_Line2: {她教导他们如何倾听自然的声音，如何克制内心的欲望，如何在宁静中寻找真正的力量。她的居所逐渐成为一片净土，吸引了许多对现状感到迷茫的赤精灵。}
Bg_Line3: {他们开始更加注重自身的修养和品行，努力克制自己的本能和天性。森林中的生灵也感受到了这种变化，它们不再畏惧赤精灵，而是以友善的目光注视着这些逐渐觉醒的高等生物。}
Bg_Line4: {最终，伊丽丝的坚持得到了回报。赤精灵族群在她的引领下焕然一新，他们不再是欲望的奴隶，而是自然的守护者。}
Bg_Line1_en: Iris decided not to remain silent any longer. She began to influence her clan in her own way, proving with her actions that the nobility of the Red Elves was not in vain. She built a quiet dwelling deep in the forest and invited those Red Elves who were willing to follow her to come and practice.
Bg_Line2_en: She taught them how to listen to the voice of nature, how to restrain their inner desires, and how to seek true power in tranquility. Her dwelling gradually became a pure land, attracting many Red Elves who were confused about the current situation.
Bg_Line3_en: They began to pay more attention to their self - cultivation and moral conduct, striving to restrain their instincts and natural tendencies. The creatures in the forest also felt this change. They no longer feared the Red Elves but instead regarded these gradually awakening superior beings with friendly eyes.
Bg_Line4_en: Finally, Iris' perseverance paid off. Under her leadership, the Red Elf clan took on a new look. They were no longer slaves to their desires but guardians of nature.

Bg_Line1: {成年的达比不再是达菲的小尾巴，但她依旧追随着达菲的脚步，以姐姐为目标不断努力，最终成为了和姐姐一样优秀的存在。}
Bg_Line2: {现在，达比找到了自己的价值。她与达菲一起在米娅的带领下，肩负着守护兽人族安危的重任。她们在冰雪之境中巡逻，与蛮族和魔物展开激烈的战斗。}
Bg_Line3: {尽管前路充满艰辛和挑战，但达比从未退缩。她知道，只有通过自己的努力，才能保护那些无辜的生命，让兽人族在这个危险的世界中得以生存和繁衍。}
Bg_Line4: {她与达菲用行动证明，即使在最艰难的环境中，只要心中有信念和爱，就一定能够找到生存的希望和力量。}
Bg_Line1_en: The grown-up Darby is no longer Duffy's little shadow, but she still follows in Duffy's footsteps. Taking her elder sister as a goal, she keeps working hard and eventually becomes as excellent as her sister.
Bg_Line2_en: Now, Darby has found her own value. Together with Duffy, under the leadership of Mia, they bear the heavy responsibility of safeguarding the safety of the Orc tribe. They patrol in the Realm of Ice and Snow and engage in fierce battles with barbarians and monsters.
Bg_Line3_en: Although the road ahead is full of hardships and challenges, Darby has never flinched. She knows that only through her own efforts can she protect those innocent lives and enable the Orc tribe to survive and thrive in this dangerous world.
Bg_Line4_en: She and Duffy have proven with their actions that even in the most difficult circumstances, as long as there is faith and love in one's heart, one will surely be able to find the hope and strength to survive.

Bg_Line2:
{今晚，梦可可决心不让自己睡得太熟，争取在这星期结束前早起一次。
或许是心理暗示起了作用，这一次她清晰地看见了自己的梦，梦里的世界光怪陆离，一会儿是情侣相约花好月圆，一会儿是恶兽追赶危在旦夕，她好像，去到了别人的梦里。}
Bg_Line3:
{不出意外地，第二天她又迟到了。
当她把昨晚发生的一切告诉哈蕾娜老师时，哈蕾娜却大喜过望，如果小姑娘没有撒谎的话，这或许是高级光明魔法之一——“眠”的初期反应。}
Bg_Line4: {终于，在哈蕾娜的魔鬼训练下，梦可可逐渐掌握了入睡和清醒的方法，有时候她甚至觉得，醒着比睡觉轻松多了。}
Bg_Line1_en:
The rejuvenating spring always makes people reluctant to wake up. When Monccoco turned off her alarm clock once again, the teacher had already marked her name with a big cross on the attendance sheet.
"Monccoco, this is already the fourth time you've been late this week, and we've only had four days of classes."
"I'm... I'm sorry, Teacher Halena, I didn't mean to." After speaking, Monccoco rubbed her eyes and couldn't help but yawn. She didn't know what was wrong with her—she felt so tired and sleepy, even though she had already slept for a long, long time.
Bg_Line2_en:
Tonight, Monccoco is determined not to sleep too deeply, aiming to wake up early at least once before the week ends.
Perhaps the psychological suggestion worked, as this time she clearly saw her own dream. The world in the dream was bizarre and surreal—one moment, lovers were meeting under a beautiful moon, and the next, she was being chased by a ferocious beast, teetering on the edge of danger. It felt as if she had entered someone else's dream.
Bg_Line3_en:
Unsurprisingly, she was late again the next day.
When she told Teacher Halena everything that had happened the previous night, Halena was overjoyed. If the girl wasn't lying, this might be the initial reaction of one of the advanced light magics—"Sleep."
Bg_Line4_en: Finally, under Halena's intense training, Monccoco gradually mastered the methods of falling asleep and waking up. Sometimes she even felt that staying awake was much easier than sleeping.

Bg_Line2: {类似这样的事情几乎每天都在发生，希娜伽的烂记性常常让圣骑士团的其他成员为之抓狂，因此每次执行任务前，罗兰总会多嘱咐她两句，以确保她没有忘记任何细节。}
Bg_Line3: {然而一旦进入工作状态，希娜伽便仿佛换了个人。凌厉不可接近的气场，干净利落的出招，无疑是在向世人证明她圣骑士团第四骑士超群的实力。}
Bg_Line4:
{近日，希娜伽接到了圣女发布的新任务——保护新来的城主大人。
虽然不知道那个人有什么独特的地方，但她一定会拼上性命完成自己接到的每一个任务。}
Bg_Line1_en:
"Aguria! Have you seen my hair tie? It was just on the table!"
Aguria, half-awake and squinting, said with a nasal tone from just waking up, "Isn't it on your wrist?"
Synaga paused for two seconds, then said, "Oh, right."
Bg_Line2_en: Similar incidents happen almost every day. Synaga's terrible memory often drives the other members of the Holy Knights crazy, so before every mission, Roland always reminds her a few extra times to make sure she hasn't forgotten any details.
Bg_Line3_en: However, once she enters work mode, Synaga seems like a completely different person. Her sharp, unapproachable aura and precise, decisive moves undoubtedly prove to the world her exceptional strength as the fourth knight of the Holy Knights.
Bg_Line4_en: Recently, Synaga received a new mission issued by Saintess Shin - to protect the newly arrived city lord. Although she doesn't know what's so special about that person, she will definitely risk her life to complete every mission she receives.

Bg_Line1: {珀瑞斯站在庄园露台上，望着新月。她的右脸完美无瑕，眼中却闪过一丝红光——那是与莉莉丝交易的代价。}
Bg_Line2: {"小姐，有位客人求见。"女仆怯生生地说道。来人是奥尔露恩，她的眼神复杂："珀瑞斯，你变了。"}
Bg_Line3: {"人总是要变的，"珀瑞斯轻笑，"就像这新月，终会圆满。"她抚摸着红宝石，眼中红光闪烁，"百年前的那场舞会，你为何会预言我们的重逢？"}
Bg_Line4: {奥尔露恩沉默离去。月光下，珀瑞斯独自站着。她知道，自己走上了一条不归路，但为了力量，她甘愿付出一切。红宝石的光芒越发妖异，仿佛在预示着什么。}
Bg_Line1_en: Perris stood on the manor's balcony, gazing at the new moon. Her right face was flawless, but a faint red light flickered in her eyes—the price of her deal with Lilith.
Bg_Line2_en: "Miss, there is a guest requesting to see you," the maid said timidly. The visitor was Olrun, her gaze filled with complexity. "Perris, you've changed."
Bg_Line3_en: "People always change," Perris said with a light laugh, "just like this new moon, it will eventually become full." She stroked the ruby, a red light flickering in her eyes. "Why did you predict our reunion at that ball a century ago?"
Bg_Line4_en: Olrun left in silence. Under the moonlight, Perris stood alone. She knew she had embarked on a path of no return, but for power, she was willing to sacrifice everything. The ruby's glow grew increasingly eerie, as if foretelling something.

Bg_Line1: {乌里托的夜晚五光十色，无论是娇惯挑剔的贵族千金，还是左右逢源的商贩老板，在乌里托餐厅你都能找到自己最喜欢的那道菜。}
Bg_Line2: {很少人知道，雅雅除了是餐厅里最受欢迎的兔女郎之外，还是这间餐厅的幕后老板。越是人多口杂的地方，信息量就越大，没有雅雅打听不到的消息，同时也没有谁能强迫雅雅提供她不愿意提供的信息。}
Bg_Line3: {雅雅喜欢金币碰撞的声音，但也清楚地知道，比钱更重要的是命。她总能很好地拿捏那个度，该知道的她一个不漏，不该知道的她绝口不提，金主们对她亦是爱恨参半，而她自己则非常享受这种危险与希望并存的生活。}
Bg_Line1_en: The nights in Uritto are colorful. Whether you're a pampered and picky noble lady or a resourceful merchant boss, you can find your favorite dish at the Uritto Restaurant.
Bg_Line2_en: Few people know that besides being the most popular bunny girl in the restaurant, Yaya is also the behind-the-scenes owner of this restaurant. The more crowded and gossipy a place is, the greater the amount of information there is. There is no information that Yaya can't dig up, and at the same time, no one can force Yaya to provide information she doesn't want to share.
Bg_Line3_en: Yaya loves the sound of gold coins clashing, but she also clearly knows that life is more important than money. She can always strike the right balance. She doesn't miss any information she should know, and she never mentions what she shouldn't. Her financial backers have a love-hate relationship with her, and she herself really enjoys this life filled with both danger and hope.

Bg_Line1:
{赤达鲁？他来做什么呢？她知道那是被收养的孩子里灵力最强且最心狠手辣却最得宠的。
“奥尔露恩让我来告诉你，你被驱逐了，奥尔露恩不需要废物。”赤达鲁的每个字都敲在普奥娜心尖，原来奥尔露恩真的会放逐她，甚至都不愿见她一面。}
Bg_Line3:
{泪水从眼角滑落，所以，我终究是被不需要的存在吗？光芒被瞬时切碎。普奥娜似乎看见了童年的自己。强大的灵力突然爆发，过往的记忆碎成了片段，将赤达鲁和普奥娜环绕。
她，竟然成功了。她获得的精灵力可以超过所有同伴了。}
Bg_Line4: {可，多么可笑，她的心已经被伤透了。逃离后，她幻化成了自己小时候的样子，躲进了深山里，她害怕着与人接触，又期待着被人需要。她从来都不能忘记那时候，她对她说，别怕，你以后有家了。}
Bg_Line1_en:
"Chidaru? What is he doing here?" She knew him as the most spiritually powerful and ruthless yet most favored among all the adopted children.
"Olrun sent me to tell you - you're banished. Olrun has no use for trash." Each of Chidaru's words struck Puona's heart like a hammer. So Olrun would truly cast her out, without even granting her a final meeting.
Bg_Line2_en:
"I don't believe it! Chidaru, I need to hear it from her directly... Ah-!"
"Shut up, worthless trash!"
Before she could finish speaking, Chidaru enveloped Puona in a beam of light, attempting to seal and banish her.
Bg_Line3_en:
ears streamed down her cheeks. "So... was I truly an unwanted existence all along?" The light shattered instantly. Puona seemed to see her childhood self. A tremendous surge of spirit power erupted suddenly, fragmenting memories of the past that encircled both Chidaru and Puona.
Against all odds... she had succeeded. The spirit power she now possessed could surpass all her peers.
Bg_Line4_en: Yet, how ironic - her heart had been utterly shattered. After escaping, she transformed into her childhood self and hid deep in the mountains. She feared human contact, yet yearned to be needed. She could never forget that moment when she told her, "Don't be afraid, you have a home now."

Bg_Line1: {当流星划过天际，夜空中绽放出绚丽的光芒；当黎明取代暗夜，新的一天悄然来临，尤缇迦知道，那一刻已经越来越近了。}
Bg_Line2:
{她开始精心布置阵法，调整灵力的流动，确保每一个细节都完美无缺。
她相信，那个人将带着希望之光如约而至。}
Bg_Line3: {那是一个能够改变一切的存在，一个能够驱散黑暗、带来光明的人。尽管梦境中的世界依然充满生机，命运的航线指向未知，但尤缇迦从未动摇过自己的信念。}
Bg_Line4: {只要不到绝境，她便决不放弃。她将继续守护封灵碑，等待那个命定之人的到来。因为她知道，只有这样，才能拯救这个充满危机的世界，让光明重新照耀在大地之上。}
Bg_Line1_en: When a shooting star streaks across the sky and the night sky bursts into brilliant light; when the dawn replaces the dark night and a new day quietly arrives, Utija knows that that moment is getting closer and closer.
Bg_Line2_en:
She began to carefully arrange the formation and adjust the flow of spiritual power, ensuring that every detail was perfect. 
She believed that that person would arrive as promised, bringing with them the light of hope.
Bg_Line3_en: That was an existence capable of changing everything, a person who could dispel the darkness and bring light. Although the world in her dreams was still filled with despair and the course of fate pointed towards the unknown, Utija never wavered in her faith.
Bg_Line4_en: As long as it is not a hopeless situation, she will never give up. She will continue to safeguard the Spirit Sealing Monument and wait for the arrival of the destined one. Because she knows that only in this way can she save this world full of crises and let the light shine on the earth once again.

Bg_Line1: {默林赛斯镇因“生命之树”繁荣了二十年，但年轻人开始怀疑乌蒂亚的故事，认为那只是传说。直到一个风雨交加的夜晚，乌蒂亚悄然归来。她在镇中心广场留下了一座古老石像，石像手中握着一颗名为“时光之心”的宝石。}
Bg_Line2: {乌蒂亚告诉镇民，这颗宝石能预见未来的危机。她将宝石嵌入石像胸口，石像的眼睛随即亮起，光芒直冲云霄。乌蒂亚留下一句“当时光之心再次闪烁时，我会回来”，便消失了。}
Bg_Line3: {几年后，默林赛斯镇遭遇干旱，土地再次贫瘠。就在镇民绝望时，时光之心闪烁起耀眼的光芒。乌蒂亚如约归来，带领镇民找到地下水源，并教会他们利用宝石的力量调节气候。}
Bg_Line4: {从此，乌蒂亚成为默林赛斯镇的守护者。她的故事不再是传说，而是镇民心中永恒的信仰。每当危机来临，时光之心闪烁，乌蒂亚的身影便会如约出现，守护这片她深爱的土地。}
Bg_Line1_en: Merlinseath had prospered for twenty years thanks to the "Tree of Life," but the younger generation began to doubt Utia's story, dismissing it as mere legend. Then, on a stormy night, Utia quietly returned. In the town square, she left an ancient stone statue holding a gem called the "Heart of Time."
Bg_Line2_en: Utia told the townsfolk that this gem could foresee future crises. As she embedded the gem into the statue's chest, its eyes lit up, sending a beam of light shooting into the sky. With a final message - "When the Heart of Time flickers again, I shall return" - Utia vanished.
Bg_Line3_en: Several years later, Merlinseath was struck by drought, and the land became barren once more. Just as the townsfolk were losing hope, the Heart of Time flickered with a dazzling light. True to her word, Utia returned, leading the people to underground water sources and teaching them to harness the gem's power to regulate the climate.
Bg_Line4_en: From that day forward, Utia became the guardian of Merlinseath. Her story was no longer just a legend, but an eternal belief in the hearts of the townspeople. Whenever crisis loomed, the Heart of Time would flicker, and Utia's figure would appear as promised, protecting this land she so deeply loved.

Bg_Line1: {能成为圣骑士团第二骑士，除了天资过人外阿古丽娅的意志力也非常人能及。接触过她的人都不免给她冠上“小太阳”的称号，她确实像阳光一样，总能带给人活力与希望，但整个圣骑士团只有罗兰知道，她曾经经历过一段灰暗时光。}
Bg_Line2: {家乡被魔物占领之后，阿古丽娅与同村的小孩一同关在了不见天日的牢房里，但她发现每过一段时间便有人来带走一部分孩子，谁也不知道他们去了哪里。}
Bg_Line3:
{这一天终于轮到阿古丽娅，她被卖给了一个地下组织。在那里的生活非常艰辛，但是她没有屈服，一个计划在她内心暗生。
没人想到不起眼的小丫头可以结束了这个黑暗的组织，那以后阿古丽娅很长一段时间都处在被敌人追踪的状态，直到在命悬一线的时刻遇见大祭司。}
Bg_Line4: {大祭司给了她一个安稳的家，教她学习魔法，同时也教会了她乐观和坚强。如今距离大祭司去世已过百年，阿古丽娅依然保持着初心，她继承了大祭司的遗志，决心将光明的力量传达给世人。}
Bg_Line1_en: To become the second knight of the Paladin Order, Aguria not only has exceptional talent but also a willpower beyond ordinary people. Anyone who has come into contact with her cannot help but give her the nickname "Little Sun." She truly is like sunlight, always bringing vitality and hope to others. However, only Roland in the entire Paladin Order knows that she once went through a dark period.
Bg_Line2_en: After her hometown was occupied by monsters, Aguria was locked in a pitch-black cell with the other children from her village. However, she noticed that after some time, people would come to take away some of the children, and no one knew where they went.
Bg_Line3_en:
Finally, the day came for Aguria. She was sold to an underground organization. Life there was extremely hard, but she didn't yield. A plan was brewing in her heart.
No one expected that this unremarkable little girl could bring an end to this dark organization. After that, Aguria was in a state of being pursued by the enemies for a long time, until she met the High Priest at a moment when her life was hanging by a thread.
Bg_Line4_en: The High Priest gave her a stable home, taught her magic, and also instilled in her optimism and resilience. Now, a century after the High Priest's passing, Aguria remains true to her original intentions. She has inherited the High Priest's legacy and is determined to spread the power of light to the world.

Bg_Line1: {所谓天才大概就是如莱恩娜，足够敏锐且天赋异禀。国会注意到她是迟早的事，再三斟酌后他们带走了年仅5岁的莱恩娜，计划将她培养成新世代的执行者。}
Bg_Line2: {逐渐长大的少女深受国会器重，她严格执行国王命令，监视着王城的一草一木，莱恩娜很喜欢这个任务，又或者说，她喜欢这个世界，这个永远鲜活，永远充满希望的世界。}
Bg_Line3:
{察觉封灵碑的异常后，她第一时间禀报了国王，魔物曾试图扰乱她纯洁的灵魂，但受过特训的少女显然没有那么容易被侵扰，但是她十足的正义感就令那些魔物恐惧。
“有新任务咯，赌上执行者的名誉，我一定要将魔物再次封印。”}
Bg_Line1_en: The so - called genius is probably someone like Lenna, who is sharp enough and incredibly talented. It was only a matter of time before the parliament noticed her. After much deliberation, they took away Lenna, who was only 5 years old, with the plan of training her to be an executor of the new generation.
Bg_Line2_en: The girl, who was growing up gradually, was highly regarded by the parliament. She strictly carried out the king's orders and monitored every plant and tree in the royal city. Lenna loved this task. Or rather, she loved this world, a world that was always full of vitality and hope.
Bg_Line3_en:
After detecting the abnormality of the Spirit - Sealing Monument, she reported it to the king immediately. The demons had tried to disrupt her pure soul, but the girl, who had received special training, was clearly not so easily bothered. Moreover, her strong sense of justice terrified those demons.
"There's a new mission. I'll stake my reputation as an executor. I must seal the demons again." Lenna said.

Bg_Line1: {觉曾经无数次坐在高台边缘，她能听到风的轻语，触摸到雨的滴落，却看不见世界的形状。不知从什么时候开始，期待的感觉消失了，快乐或是悲伤于她而言都毫无意义。}
Bg_Line2: {她原以为自己的心再也掀不起一丝波澜，直到封灵碑封印破损，库洛兰德大乱，拉法叶的声声低诉终是唤醒了她尘封于内心深处的记忆。}
Bg_Line3:
{她说，觉，再等一等，我已经找到治愈你眼睛的方法了，等魔物被封印我们一定可以过回以前美好的日子。
那一瞬间觉听见了自己的心跳声，所以，就再期待一下吧。}
Bg_Line1_en: Satoru had sat on the edge of the high platform countless times. She could hear the whispers of the wind and feel the raindrops, but she couldn't see the shape of the world. She didn't know when it started, but the feeling of anticipation had disappeared. Happiness or sadness meant nothing to her.
Bg_Line2_en: She had thought that her heart would never stir again. However, when the seal of the Spirit - Sealing Monument was damaged and Kurorand fell into chaos, the soft whispers of Lafayette finally awakened the memories that had been sealed deep in her heart.
Bg_Line3_en:
She said, "Satoru, wait a little longer. I've found a way to cure your eyes. Once the demons are sealed, we'll definitely be able to return to the good old days."
At that moment, Satoru heard the sound of her own heartbeat. So, she decided to look forward to it again.

Bg_Line1: {阿古丽娅站在圣骑士团的高塔上，望着远方的天空。夕阳的余晖洒在她的银甲上，折射出温暖的光芒。突然，一只受伤的白鸽跌落在她脚边，脚上绑着一封沾血的信件。她展开信件，上面写着："暗影森林，孩子们需要你。"}
Bg_Line2: {她立即策马赶往暗影森林，心中隐隐不安。森林深处传来微弱的哭泣声，她循声而去，发现几个黑袍人正围着一群瑟瑟发抖的孩子。黑袍人冷笑道："十五年前让你逃了，这次可不会了。"}
Bg_Line3: {战斗一触即发。阿古丽娅毫不犹豫地冲入敌阵，手中的武器化作两道银光，每一次突刺都带走一个魔物的性命。她的速度之快，让敌人根本无法捕捉她的身影。}
Bg_Line4: {最终，黑袍人在光芒中溃散。阿古丽娅抱起一个哭泣的小女孩，轻声安慰道："别怕，有我在。"她望着孩子们重获自由的笑脸，明白这就是她坚守的意义——用光明驱散黑暗，守护每一个需要帮助的人。}
Bg_Line1_en: Aguria stood on the high tower of the Paladin Order, looking at the distant sky. The afterglow of the setting sun fell on her silver armor, refracting a warm light. Suddenly, a wounded white dove fell at her feet, with a blood - stained letter tied to its leg. She unfolded the letter, which read: "In the Shadow Forest, the children need you."
Bg_Line2_en: She immediately mounted her horse and rushed towards the Shadow Forest, feeling a sense of unease. Faint cries came from the depths of the forest. She followed the sound and found several people in black robes surrounding a group of trembling children. The black - robed men sneered and said, "You managed to escape fifteen years ago, but not this time."
Bg_Line3_en: The battle was on the verge of breaking out. Aguria charged into the enemy ranks without hesitation. The weapons in her hands turned into two silver lights, and each stab took the life of a demon. She was so fast that the enemies couldn't even catch sight of her.
Bg_Line4_en: Finally, the men in black robes dispersed in the light. Aguria picked up a crying little girl and comforted her softly, "Don't be afraid. I'm here." Looking at the smiling faces of the children who regained their freedom, she understood the meaning of her perseverance - to dispel darkness with light and protect everyone in need.

Bg_Line2: {然而一场人族之间的战争冲突却打破了平静，她只能眼睁睁地看着养父母在战争中被苦苦折磨着离去，灵魂之力破散在空中。躲在角落里的蒂尔看到了面目狰狞的士兵们，以及战争后千疮百孔的土地、破败不堪的房屋。这时，她看清了人族光明之力下的虚伪与残忍。隐匿在身体里的兽族气息被诱发了出来，黑色瞳仁也化成鲜艳的红色。}
Bg_Line3:
{幻形后的蒂尔对自己的力量不能很好的控制，她肆意地破坏着周围的一切，发泄着体内突然暴涨的力量带来的痛苦。直到遇见斯莉德，她拿给了蒂尔一柄散发着红色辉光的利剑，她体内不安分的力量才缓缓平息下来。
这柄需要依靠生物的灵魂之力去滋养的利剑于蒂尔而言是一把双刃剑。蒂尔的力量在增强的同时，对灵魂之力的渴望也在增加，甚至偶尔会丧失理智。但，能摧毁光明的力量她又怎么会放弃呢。}
Bg_Line4:
{她没有信仰，被邪恶吞噬的内心只是斯莉德眼中一把绝佳的武器。
白天她藏匿在各种角落里，暗夜才是她开始捕猎的主场。}
Bg_Line1_en:
