Thiel belongs to a Alien Bat within the Orc tribe. This is a species that has an extreme fondness for the soul energy of living beings.
When she was a child, Thiel wasn't as cold - hearted as she is now. Everything changed after a great war.
As an orc, she was adopted by human civilians when she was young. At that time, she was deeply influenced by the power of light. Although she didn't have fancy clothes or delicious food, the love of her adoptive parents nourished her. Everywhere she looked, there was beauty - friendly neighbors, a warm sun, and soft grasslands.
Bg_Line2_en: However, a war conflict among humans shattered the peace. She could only watch helplessly as her adoptive parents were tortured to death in the war, and their soul energy scattered into the air. Thiel, hiding in the corner, saw the hideous - faced soldiers, as well as the war - torn land and dilapidated houses. At that moment, she saw through the hypocrisy and cruelty beneath the power of light of the human race. The orcish aura hidden in her body was triggered, and her black pupils turned bright red.
Bg_Line3_en:
After transforming, Thiel couldn't control her power well. She wantonly destroyed everything around her, venting the pain caused by the suddenly surging power within her body. It was not until she met Slider that Slider gave Thiel a sharp sword emitting a red glow, and the restless power in her body gradually subsided.
This sharp sword, which needs to be nourished by the soul power of living beings, is a double - edged sword for Thiel. While Thiel's power is increasing, her desire for soul power is also growing, and she may even lose her reason occasionally. However, how could she give up the power that can destroy the light?
Bg_Line4_en:
She has no faith. Her heart consumed by evil is just an excellent weapon in the eyes of Slider.
During the day, she hides in various corners, and the dark night is the stage where she starts her hunting.

Bg_Line1:
{斐拉一直是温特利亚家族中最出色的存在。
温特利亚家族自从先辈陨落，百年来没有一个族人能进入圣骑士团，甚至在逐渐式微。而斐拉作为人类与精灵的结合体，觉醒的力量给没落的温特利亚家族带来了荣誉和生机。}
Bg_Line2: {斐拉诞生那日有层层圣光包裹着她，家族长老闻讯赶来把她带走了。这时被封存在密室里的器械也在散出缕缕蓝光，与斐拉体内的力量形成了感应。这给温特利亚家族带来了极大的惊喜。}
Bg_Line3: {斐拉至今不知道她的父母是何模样，家族里的长老对此缄口不言，只是日复一日地督促她一刻不停地研习和进修。年幼时斐拉常因为一瞬的懈怠而被责罚，或被难以控制的器具所伤。但长老却告诫她不能失败，更严厉地对她进行训练。有片刻的休息时，她想与其他族人亲近，但他们总是避而远之。久而久之，斐拉排斥与他人亲近，甚至变得傲娇，并拒人千里之外。}
Bg_Line4: {成为圣骑士团成员对斐拉而言并不是很重要，只是为了完成家族的使命罢了。出使骑士团的任务使她见证了人类的渺小和脆弱，也目睹了他们的真情实意。虽然她对此表现得不屑一顾，讽刺得毫不留情，但孤独的内心也拥有着柔软的内心，渴望着这一分亲密。}
Bg_Line1_en: Phila has always been the most outstanding one in the Winteria Family. Since the fall of their ancestors, no member of the Winteria Family has been able to join the Paladin Order for a hundred years, and the family has even been in decline. As a hybrid of human and elf, Phila's awakened power has brought honor and vitality to the declining Winteria Family.
Bg_Line2_en: On the day Phila was born, layers of holy light enveloped her. The family elders, hearing the news, rushed over and took her away. At that moment, the equipment sealed in the secret chamber also emitted strands of blue light, resonating with the power within Phila. This brought great surprise to the Winteria family.
Bg_Line3_en: To this day, Phila does not know what her parents looked like. The elders of the family remain tight-lipped about it, only urging her day after day to study and train without pause. As a child, Phila was often punished for moments of laziness or injured by uncontrollable equipment. But the elders warned her not to fail and trained her even more harshly. During rare moments of rest, she wanted to get closer to other tribe members, but they always kept their distance. Over time, Phila grew to reject closeness with others, even becoming tsundere and keeping people at arm's length.
Bg_Line4_en: Becoming a member of the Paladin Order is not very important to Phila. It's just to fulfill the mission of her family. The task of being an envoy to the Paladin Order has made her witness the insignificance and fragility of humans, as well as their genuine emotions. Although she shows disdain and is merciless in her sarcasm, her lonely heart also has a soft side, longing for that bit of intimacy.

Bg_Line1:
{奥兰多是圣骑士团的灵眼。
她作为一个通灵人，不仅可以与一切通灵之物沟通，而且透过她那双水蓝色的眼睛可以看到未来。但灵眼所及之处并不具体，只是一些象征性的符号和画面。在预感强烈之时，她的长枪也会发生感应，指示方向。}
Bg_Line2:
{但这远远不够，还需要尤缇迦的指引下才能找到答案。
在她途径一个边陲小镇时，曾感知到小镇即将有巨大灾难发生。但转而这种预感消失了，反而是小镇即将迎来蓬勃发展。}
Bg_Line3: {两种极度割裂的未来让还不够成熟的预言家奥兰多受尽了折磨，她的精神力损失严重。还未来得及作出正确的选择，灾难已经提前降临在小镇上。熊熊烈火在镇上蔓延，被火势困住的奥兰多力量透支严重，听到人们的痛吟，她心焦如焚却无计可施。}
Bg_Line4: {这次灾难让奥兰多对自己的存在和能力产生了怀疑，一度游离在世界之外，不敢面对现实。但尤缇迦告诉她，预言是神的旨意，灾难的意外来临只是背离神者的惩罚。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Orlando is the spiritual eye of the Paladins.
As a psychic, she can not only communicate with all psychic things, but also see the future through her aqua blue eyes. But what the spiritual eye can reach is not specific, just some symbolic symbols and pictures. When the premonition is strong, her spear will also sense and indicate the direction.
Bg_Line2_en:
But this is far from enough, and it takes Utija's guidance to find the answer.
When she was passing through a border town, she had sensed that a huge disaster was about to happen in the town. But instead this hunch disappeared, and instead, the town was about to usher in vigorous development.
Bg_Line3_en: The two extremely divided futures have tortured the immature prophet Orlando, and her mental strength has been severely damaged. Before we can make the right choice, disaster has already come to the town in advance. The raging fire spread in the town, and Orlando, trapped by the fire, was severely overdrawn. Hearing people's pain, she was so anxious but could do nothing.
Bg_Line4_en: This disaster made Orlando doubt his own existence and ability, and he was once outside the world, afraid to face reality. But Yutika told her that the prophecy was the will of God, and the unexpected arrival of disaster was just a punishment for those who deviate from God.

Bg_Line2: {生活的村庄里遇到了天灾人祸，狂风吹倒了房屋，军队交战踏破了土地。村民们在乱中逃窜，而她的母亲为了救一个被压在坍塌房屋下的小女孩被军队特制的箭倒在地，再也没有起来。}
Bg_Line3:
{被救出的小女孩并不觉得感恩或是愧疚，甚至埋怨夏蒂的母亲救了她，害她还要受尽折磨。而幸存下来的夏蒂也在其他村民们的脸上看到了冷漠的神情。
从此夏蒂认为母亲说的善良的人总是幸运的这句话毫无道理，她开始不信任任何人，因为任何人都可以抛弃或者被抛弃。}
Bg_Line4:
{但是她手中的利剑却从没刺向无辜之人，面对邪恶力量造成的无妄之灾时，她也并不能无动于衷。因为这时她会想起她的母亲在临前的微笑和念叨。
也许在夏蒂心里，那把利剑就如母亲般的存在，让她内心得到了抚慰，怀有希望。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Shady is always on her own, she doesn't think it's a good thing to cooperate with humans, but she also doesn't agree with Slide's extreme approach of destroying the world.
In the eyes of others, Shady always appeared as a bystander, cold and arrogant, but at first she was not like that.
Shady's mother is extremely kind and kind, empathetic, and likes to help the weak and solve difficulties, but her mother does not get good returns.
Bg_Line2_en: There were natural and man-made disasters in the village where he lived. The strong wind blew down the house, and the army fought and trampled the land. The villagers fled in the chaos, while her mother was thrown to the ground by a special arrow made by the army in order to save a little girl who was crushed under the collapsed house and never got up again.
Bg_Line3_en:
The rescued little girl didn't feel grateful or guilty, and even complained that Shady's mother had rescued her, causing her to be tortured. And Shady, who survived, also saw indifference on the faces of the other villagers.
From then on, Shattie thought that her mother's saying that good people are always lucky was unreasonable, and she began to distrust anyone, because anyone can be abandoned or abandoned.
Bg_Line4_en:
However, the sharp sword in her hand never stabbed innocent people, and she could not remain indifferent when faced with the unavoidable disaster caused by evil forces. Because then she will think of her mother's smile and talk before her arrival.
Perhaps in Shady's heart, the sharp sword was like a mother's existence, which gave her comfort and hope.

Bg_Line2:
{但贝缇娜与之不同，她向往和平和安宁，更不愿参与打斗和战争。这让很多族人对她产生偏见和不满，来挑衅的也不在少数。蒂尔就是其中之一。
族内有名的战斗之一就是蒂尔和贝缇娜在森林里的交战。在这之前没有人与贝缇娜真正的打斗过，她总是单方面的防御和逃避。}
Bg_Line3:
{这一战让不少族人见识了贝缇娜的真正力量，不禁感到后怕。
起初，贝缇娜路过被邪念包裹的蒂尔，善意地上前想缓解一下蒂尔的痛苦。但蒂尔见到内心无比光明的贝缇娜，想到了自己以前愚蠢的光明信仰，这一刻的蒂尔体内充斥着煞气和邪念。}
Bg_Line4:
{面临如此步步紧逼的蒂尔，贝缇娜的防守完全无法招架。眼看自己即将被利刃刺穿喉咙，贝缇娜的自我防御武器双尾戟爆发了强大力量。
这一战后族内同辈几乎无人再找贝缇娜寻衅生事。因为就连强大如蒂尔，也无法完胜。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Bettina is a very special existence in the orc race.
Bettina's golden eyes are as gentle and smooth as water, and her stature is also petite and lovely, and her deceptive appearance will always make the enemy take it lightly.
There are many competitions among the younger generation in the clan, arrogance, belligerence, and unwillingness to admit defeat are their innate natures.
Bg_Line2_en:
But Bettina is different, she yearns for peace and tranquility, and is even more reluctant to participate in fights and wars. This made many clansmen have prejudice and dissatisfaction with her, and there were not a few who came to provoke her. Thiel is one of them.
One of the famous battles in the clan is the battle between Thiel and Bettina in the forest. No one had really fought with Bettina before, she was always unilaterally defending and evading.
Bg_Line3_en:
This battle allowed many clansmen to see the true power of Bettina, and they couldn't help but feel scared.
At first, Bettina passed by Thiel, who was wrapped in evil thoughts, and stepped forward with kindness to relieve Thiel's pain. But when Thiel saw Bettina, who had an extremely bright heart, he thought of his foolish belief in the light before. At this moment, Thiel was full of evil spirits and evil thoughts.
Bg_Line4_en:
Facing such a pressing Thiel, Bettina's defense was completely unstoppable. Seeing that she was about to be pierced by a sharp blade in her throat, Bettina's self-defense weapon, the Two-Tailed Halberd, exploded with great power.
After the war, almost no one of the same generation in the clan looked for Bettina to provoke trouble. Because even as strong as Thiel can't win.

Bg_Line1:
{德琳黑发紫眸具有攻击性的面孔总是被人类误解，但她从不在意，也从不解释。
最初，德琳并不是一名守夜人，是她体内强大的力量吸引了执行完任务的佐伊。}
Bg_Line2: {德琳体内难以掌控的两股力量在互相争抢和搏斗，使得她疼痛异常，一直处于暴走状态。德琳知道佐伊的打算，但如果再不进行压制，她有可能会暴裂而亡。于是，她答应了佐伊的条件，作为一名守夜人活了下来，但从此失去了自由。}
Bg_Line3:
{成为守夜人虽不是她的意愿，执行任务时也永远是暗夜中的独行客，但在危急时刻，却从未抛弃过同伴。
而作为人族的德琳，生命却比一般人族要长，但相貌并不会衰老。}
Bg_Line4:
{她在老国王诞生之际就已存在，见过这个大陆的荣辱兴衰。在她生人勿近的外表下也有一颗怜悯之心，但她却并不相信所谓的神之语言和救世主。
她只相信一切真正的力量。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Madeline's aggressive face with black hair and purple eyes is always misunderstood by humans, but she never cares and never explains.
At first,Madeline was not a night watchman, it was the powerful power in her body that attracted Zoe who had completed her mission.
Bg_Line2_en: The two uncontrollable forces in Madeline's body were fighting and fighting with each other, causing her to experience extreme pain and be in a state of berserk. Madeline knew Zoe's plan, but if she didn't suppress it, she might explode and die. So she agreed to Zoe's condition and survived as a night watchman, but lost her freedom ever since.
Bg_Line3_en:
Although it was not her wish to become a night watchman, and she would always be a lone traveler in the dark night when performing tasks, but in critical moments, she never abandoned her companions.
As a human race, Madeline has a longer lifespan than the average human race, but her appearance does not age.
Bg_Line4_en:
She existed when the old king was born, and she has seen the ups and downs of this continent. There is also a compassionate heart under her unfriendly appearance, but she does not believe in the so-called language of God and the savior.
She only believes in all real power.

Bg_Line1:
{作为兽人族族长最受宠的小女儿，性格却与兽人族相差甚远。在哈娜的世界里，万物都具有纯善之心。
哈娜刚出生时十分弱小，呼吸不稳，险些丢了性命。在族人的细心呵护下，哈娜养成了纯真善良的一面。}
Bg_Line2: {只要是哈娜想要的东西，都会得到，但她总想去外面的世界去看看。直到成年的那一天，哈娜躲过找她的人群，无意中触碰到了族内禁地。一把长柄斧钺向她飞来，禁地磁场反应过于强烈，来不及多想，哈娜已晕倒在地。这是哈娜苏醒后脑海中最后的记忆，她试着拿起随她而来的兵器，竟轻松无比。}
Bg_Line3:
{无论是谁擅闯禁地，都会受到惩罚，但哈娜不仅没有被惩罚，而且族人连同族长在内都停止所有战事为哈娜祈福。
就连族内最特别的贝缇娜也感到好奇，如此天真柔弱，怎么让高傲、自大、好战的兽人一族为之顺从的。}
Bg_Line4:
{有传言说是因为哈娜的母亲是兽人族至高无上的英雄，也有人说是因为哈娜体内的蓝色血液无比珍稀……
但真正的真相究竟是什么，没有人知道。}
Bg_Line1_en:
As the most favored youngest daughter of the patriarch of the orc clan, her character is far from that of the orc clan. In Hana's world, everything has a pure and kind heart.
Hana was very weak when she was born, her breathing was not stable, and she almost lost her life. Under the careful care of her tribe, Hana developed a pure and kind side.
Bg_Line2_en: As long as Hana wants, she will get it, but she always wants to go to the outside world to see. Until the day when she became an adult, Hana avoided the crowd looking for her and accidentally touched the forbidden area of the clan. A long-handled ax flew towards her, the forbidden ground's magnetic field reacted too strongly, and Hana fainted to the ground before she had time to think about it. This was the last memory in Hana's mind after waking up. She tried to pick up the weapon that came with her, but it was extremely easy.
Bg_Line3_en:
Anyone who trespasses into the forbidden land will be punished, but Hana was not only spared punishment—the entire tribe, including the clan leader, ceased all warfare to pray for her.
Even Bettina, the most unique member of the tribe, was curious. How could someone so innocent and delicate make the proud, arrogant, and warlike beastmen submit to her?
Bg_Line4_en:
Some say it's because Hana's mother was the supreme hero of the beastmen tribe, while others claim it's because the blue blood within Hana is incredibly rare...
But what the true truth is, no one knows.

Bg_Line1:
{尤蕾拉很喜欢恶作剧，但她的伎俩并不巧妙，甚至漏洞百出。
她很享受愚弄他人的这种乐趣， 有时候她只是在与人类愉悦交谈时突然幻化出毛茸茸的兽耳或是兽尾，或是露出自己的尖齿做出吃人的表情。}
Bg_Line2: {在好战的兽人一族中，她却最喜欢躲藏和隐蔽，并不恋战。尤蕾拉很擅长利用自己小巧的身形，以及不引人注意的毛发，穿梭在黑夜中，让人不易发现。她也常常用这样的方式在暗处闪现，又快速消失，然后在暗处等待他人惊吓的模样。}
Bg_Line3:
{但最近尤蕾拉有点恼怒，她的恶作剧对新来的异世界的人并不起作用，她甚至化出狼人凶恶的原形也不能吓他一下。
所以，最近的尤蕾拉更加神出鬼没，在努力制造一些小动静。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Eurera loves to play tricks, but her tricks are not subtle, and even full of loopholes.
She enjoys fooling others, and sometimes she just conjures up furry ears or tails, or reveals her fangs in a cannibalistic expression, when she is pleasantly chatting with humans.
Bg_Line2_en: Among the warlike orcs, she likes hiding and hiding the most, and she doesn't like fighting. Eurella is very good at using her small body and unobtrusive hair to shuttle through the night, making it difficult for people to find. She also often used this method to flash in the dark, and then quickly disappeared, and then waited in the dark for others to look frightened.
Bg_Line3_en:
But recently Eurera was a little annoyed, her pranks didn't work on the newcomer from another world, and she couldn't scare him even by turning into a werewolf's ferocious original form.
Therefore, recently Eureira is even more elusive, trying to create some small movements.

Bg_Line1: {没有哪一只精灵像多莉一样，能与大自然进行无声息的灵魂沟通。无论是树木花草，还是游鱼飞鸟，都能被多莉的热情感染，被她折服。}
Bg_Line2: {多莉尤其喜欢在森林中飞行和栖息，感受清新自由的气息，这让她形成了独特的自然力量，具有疗愈能力的同时也具有复苏的能力。}
Bg_Line3:
{“多莉！停下！”
精灵长老看着自己精心清理掉的杂草又被多莉一箭复苏，有些气急败坏。但多莉显然没有在意长老的情绪，一瞬间让光秃的土地绿意盎然。}
Bg_Line4: {因为多莉是自由的，也认为万物也是自由的，不应该扼杀它们的生长，也认为“有用”不应该成为自然的标准。她与众不同的想法一直不被他人接纳，但她依然在用行动履行自己的观点，所到之处皆是生命气息。}
Bg_Line1_en: There is no elf like Dolly who can communicate silently with nature. Whether it is trees, flowers and plants, or fish and birds, you can be infected by Dolly's enthusiasm and be impressed by her.
Bg_Line2_en: Dolly especially likes to fly and inhabit the forest, and feel the fresh and free breath, which makes her form a unique natural power, which has the ability to heal and revive at the same time.
Bg_Line3_en: Dolly! Stop!" The elf elder was a little out of breath as he watched the weeds he had carefully cleaned up were revived by Dolly's arrow. But Dolly obviously didn't care about the elder's emotions, and instantly made the bare land green.
Bg_Line4_en: Because Dolly is free, she also believes that all things are also free, and their growth should not be stifled, and she also believes that "usefulness" should not be the standard of nature. Her unique ideas have not been accepted by others, but she is still implementing her views with actions, and everywhere she goes is the breath of life.

Bg_Line1:
{莉薇娅从小生活在一个与世隔绝的神秘森林里。在祖母的指导下，学会使用了一本神奇的魔导书。祖母临终前，曾告诫莉薇娅谨慎使用力量，避免酿成灾难。
莉薇娅虽尊敬祖母教诲，却渴望展现自己的能力。}
Bg_Line2: {她开始游历，寻找需要帮助的人。某次，她来到一座小城，结识了那里的领主，协助他处理各类事务。在权力诱惑下，她逐渐迷失。直到她发现领主意图利用她的力量控制城内的居民谋求无尽能量。}
Bg_Line3: {关键时刻，她想起祖母的教诲，认识到力量应用于保护无辜。她揭露领主阴谋，拯救了居民。从此，她决心仅在必要时使用魔导书的力量，捍卫正义和无辜生命。她关注弱势群体。她渴望用力量捍卫正义，为世界带来和平。}
Bg_Line4: {她不断提升自己的能力，为弱者发声。她誓言永远铭记祖母的教诲，将魔导书的力量用于正义事业。尽管前路充满挑战，但她坚信，只要信念坚定，黑暗势力终将被驱散。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Livia lived in a mysterious forest isolated from the world since she was a child. Under the guidance of her grandmother, she learned to use a magical magic book. Before her death, her grandmother warned Livia to use power carefully to avoid disasters .
Although Livia respects her grandmother's teachings, she is eager to show her abilities.
Bg_Line2_en: She began to travel, looking for people in need. One time, she came to a small town, got acquainted with the lord there, and assisted him in handling various affairs. Under the temptation of power, she gradually lost herself. Until she discovered that the lord was trying to use her power to control the residents of the city for endless energy.
Bg_Line3_en: At the critical moment, she remembered her grandmother's teachings and realized that power should be used to protect the innocent. She uncovered the plot of the lord and saved the inhabitants. Since then, she is determined to use the power of the magic book only when necessary to defend justice and innocent lives. She focuses on the underprivileged. She is eager to use her strength to defend justice and bring peace to the world.
Bg_Line4_en: She constantly improves her abilities and speaks out for the weak. She vowed to always remember her grandmother's teachings and use the power of the magic book for the just cause. Although the road ahead is full of challenges, she firmly believes that as long as the faith is firm, the dark forces will eventually be dispelled.

Bg_Line1: {塞雷娜的双手被神秘锁链所束缚，这些锁链的目的是为了控制她强大的力量。她失去了记忆，对自己的过去一无所知，唯一的线索是她佩戴的一条镶嵌红宝石的项链。}
Bg_Line2: {塞雷娜意识到，要找回失去的记忆，她必须展开一段寻找自己过去的征程。在这段旅途中，她遇到了许多志同道合的伙伴，他们在困境时互相扶持。通过不断的实践与挑战，塞雷娜逐步学会了如何控制自己的力量，锁链的束缚也开始变得不再那么严密。}
Bg_Line3: {随着时间推移，塞雷娜逐渐理解了自己的过去。她勇敢地面对自己的身世和命运，立志用自己的力量守护她所珍视的一切。}
Bg_Line1_en: Serena's hands are bound by mysterious chains designed to control her mighty powers. She has lost her memory and is ignorant of her past, with the only clue being a necklace she wears set with rubies.
Bg_Line2_en: Serena realizes that to get her lost memories back, she must embark on a journey to find her past. During this journey, she met many like-minded partners who supported each other in times of difficulty. Through continuous practice and challenges, Serena gradually learned how to control her power, and the chains became less tight.
Bg_Line3_en: As time goes by, Serena comes to understand her past. She bravely faces her life experience and destiny, determined to protect everything she cherishes with her own strength.

Bg_Line1:
{露娜是一位拥有水之力的纯洁天使，她的羽翼如白云般柔软。她是大自然的守护者，被赋予操控水元素的神奇能力。
露娜诞生在一片宁静的湖泊，她的心灵纯净如清泉，天使的羽翼在她的背后展开。}
Bg_Line2: {随着时光流逝，她的力量日益增长。她能够驾驭湍急的瀑布，呼唤涓涓细流，以及用水的力量治愈受伤的生灵。然而，她深知这份特殊的能力必须用于保护与爱护。}
Bg_Line3: {每当风暴肆虐，露娜挺身而出，用水的柔和之力抚平波涛，保护人们免受灾难之苦。她用水的温柔，温暖着世间的寒冷，用爱与和平点亮黑暗的角落。}
Bg_Line4: {如今，露娜是众人心中永不熄灭的希望之光。她用纯洁的心灵与水的力量，守护着大自然与生命的美好。她是天使，也是水之护卫者。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Luna is a pure-hearted angel gifted with the power of water; her wings are as soft as white clouds. She is a guardian of nature, bestowed with the mystical ability to control the water element.
Born near a tranquil lake, Luna's heart is as pure as a crystal-clear spring, and her angelic wings unfurl behind her.
Bg_Line2_en: As time goes by, her power grows stronger. She can control rushing waterfalls, summon gentle streams, and use the power of water to heal wounded creatures. Yet, she knows that this unique ability must be used for protection and care.
Bg_Line3_en: Whenever storms rage, Luna steps forward, using the gentle force of water to calm the waves and shield people from disaster. She uses the tender touch of water to warm the world's chill and illuminate dark corners with love and peace.
Bg_Line4_en: Now, Luna is the eternal beacon of hope in everyone's hearts. With her pure soul and the power of water, she safeguards the beauty of nature and all living beings. She is an angel and a protector of water.

Bg_Line1: {年幼时，瑶琳被一个神秘组织收养，接受严苛的训练，成为了他们最精锐的刺客。她的眼神冰冷如冰，心如铁石，学会了在战场上保持冷静与果断。}
Bg_Line2: {长大后，瑶琳独当一面，成为了组织中最顶尖的杀手。她外表妖娆动人，却隐藏着致命的杀机。无论何时，她都是致命的引诱，敌人在瞬间陷入死亡陷阱。}
Bg_Line3: {瑶琳的兵器储备丰富，剑、刀、弓、枪，无所不能。她的战技精湛，敌人常常只在她的眼神中看到死亡的冰冷。在战场之外，她孤寂如冰，但她坚信只有如此，才能守护自己的心灵。}
Bg_Line1_en: Yao Lin was a girl adopted by a mysterious organization at a young age, undergoing rigorous training to become the organization's most elite assassin. Her gaze was as cold as ice, and her heart as firm as a rock, learning to remain calm and decisive on the battlefield.
Bg_Line2_en: As she grew older, Yao Lin became the organization's top assassin. Despite her alluring appearance, she concealed a deadly allure. No matter the circumstance, she was a lethal lure, ensnaring enemies in a moment of death.
Bg_Line3_en: Yao Lin excelled in various weapons, from swords and knives to bows and guns, mastering them all. Her combat skills were exceptional, with enemies often only seeing death's icy gaze in her eyes. Off the battlefield, she was as solitary as ice, believing that this was necessary to protect her inner self.

Bg_Line1: {露米是罕见的“暮光精灵”——精灵与人类的混血。她的存在本身便是禁忌，因暮光精灵被视为自然平衡的破坏者。}
Bg_Line2: {露米自幼便被遗弃在默林赛斯镇的“生命之树”下，被乌蒂亚秘密抚养，她的童年与“生命之树”共生。乌蒂亚从未提及她的身世，只说她是“被月光祝福的孩子”。}
Bg_Line3: {直到12岁那年，露米在树根深处发现了一本残破的日记，字迹潦草地写着：“暮光之子，血脉即诅咒。”}
Bg_Line4: {当晚，她的掌心绽开荆棘般的暗纹，藤曼从地底暴起，险些吞噬整个花园。乌蒂亚叹息着封印了她的力量，告诫她永远不可踏入森林南部的“沉眠之地”。}
Bg_Line1_en: Lumi is a rare "Twilight Elf" - a hybrid of elf and human. Her very existence is taboo, as twilight elves are considered disruptors of nature's balance.
Bg_Line2_en: Abandoned under the "Tree of Life" in Merlinseath Town as an infant, she was secretly raised by Utia. Her childhood was symbiotically tied to the ancient tree. Utia never spoke of her origins, only calling her "a child blessed by moonlight."
Bg_Line3_en: At age twelve, Lumi discovered a tattered diary deep in the roots, its pages scrawled with: "Child of Twilight, your bloodline is the curse."
Bg_Line4_en: That night, thorn-like dark patterns bloomed on her palms as vines erupted from the earth, nearly devouring the entire garden. With a sigh, Utia sealed her powers, warning her never to enter the southern forest's "Slumbering Grounds."

Bg_Line1: {瑟拉的家族死于魔物潮，父亲临终前将魔剑“噬铁”交给她：“别让它饿着。”她很快发现，这把剑会吞噬金属，并变得更强——但每次使用，剑身的血色纹路都会蔓延到她手上。}
Bg_Line2: {她以佣兵身份流浪，靠“噬铁”斩魔维生。直到圣骑士团第六骑士拉法叶找来，告知她这把剑在吞噬封灵碑的碎片——它吃的不是金属，而是封印魔物的诅咒。}
Bg_Line3: {如今，瑟拉成为对抗迪布克组织的利刃。她的右臂已半被剑纹侵蚀，但她冷笑：“比起死，我宁愿和这把饿鬼剑共生。”}
Bg_Line1_en: Sera's family perished in a demon tide. With his dying breath, her father entrusted her with the cursed sword "Iron Devourer": "Never let it starve." She soon discovered the blade consumed metal to grow stronger—but with each use, crimson patterns would creep from the sword onto her skin.
Bg_Line2_en: Wandering as a mercenary, Sera survived by slaying demons with the blade. Until the day Lafayette, the Sixth Knight of the Holy Knights, revealed the truth: the sword was feeding on fragments of the Spirit-Sealing Steles—it hungered not for metal, but for the curses imprisoning demons.
Bg_Line3_en: Now Sera serves as a blade against the Dibuk cult. Though the sword's patterns have claimed half her right arm, she sneers: "Better to coexist with this ravenous demon than die."

Bg_Line1: {费伊出生于精灵族最古老的月辉之森，是一位被预言之星选中的魔法天才。自幼便展现出对奥术知识的惊人领悟力。她的导师曾说：“她对魔法的理解，仿佛本就镌刻在灵魂中。”}
Bg_Line2: {成年仪式后，费伊选择走出族地，踏上寻找“星辉圣典”的旅途——那是传说中封印着古代精灵魔导真理的遗物。她在各地遗迹中留下足迹，破解咒文、征服魔兽，甚至与异界魔导师展开对决。}
Bg_Line3: {如今的她，已然成为联盟中最年轻的高阶魔法师之一。她的“奥数飞弹”既是毁灭的象征，也是智慧的结晶。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Faye was born in the Moonlight Grove, the oldest sanctuary of the elves, and was chosen by the Star of Prophecy as a magical prodigy. From an early age, she demonstrated astonishing insight into arcane knowledge.
Her mentor once said, “Her understanding of magic feels as if it were etched into her soul.”
Bg_Line2_en: After her coming-of-age ceremony, Faye chose to leave her homeland and embark on a journey to find the Stellarium Codex—a legendary relic said to hold the ancient truths of elven magic.She left her mark across countless ruins, unraveling enchantments, conquering magical beasts, and even dueling with otherworldly archmages.
Bg_Line3_en: Now, she stands as one of the youngest High Mages in the entire Alliance. Her “Arcane Missiles” are not only symbols of destruction but also crystallizations of intellect.

Bg_Line1:
{妮克丝曾是一名宫廷药师，她的药剂和治疗法术一度被誉为“圣树之恩”，几乎没有人不愿向她求助。然而，那些活下来的贵族却永远也不敢直视她的眼睛。
因为她的救赎，从不是免费的。}
Bg_Line2: {一次大瘟疫爆发，妮克丝违背王室法令，偷偷翻阅并实践了精灵族禁忌典籍——《夜语之书》，尝试以“灵魂转换”的古老咒术治疗感染者。}
Bg_Line3:
{她确实拯救了许多生命，却也因此引来了审判。
在流放之前，她留下了这句话：“既然太阳会抛弃你们，那就让黑夜来守护吧。”}
Bg_Line1_en:
Nyx was once a court apothecary, her potions and healing spells hailed as the “Grace of the Sacred Tree.” There was hardly anyone who didn’t seek her aid.
Yet those nobles who survived never dared meet her gaze again—because her salvation never came without a cost.
Bg_Line2_en: When a great plague struck, Nyx defied royal law by secretly studying and applying the forbidden elven tome, The Nocturne, attempting to use the ancient soul-transference ritual to cure the afflicted.
Bg_Line3_en:
She did save many lives, but was condemned for her actions. Before being exiled, she left these parting words:
“If the sun abandons you—let the night protect you instead.”
Bg_Line4_en:
Now, Nyx has established her own Silent Altar in the borderlands. She no longer serves any crown—only the will of the wounded and her own judgment.
Her powers stem from sacrifice and ancient curses, chilling to behold. Yet everyone who walks out of her sanctuary lives.
She is no saint, but you will want her on your side.

Bg_Line1:
{世界万物都有其运行的一套法则。
生、老、病、死。
也常常有意外，跳过了其中的一个阶段。
当然，最不能跳过的是最后一个阶段。
所有的一切都有其命定之死。
无法回避。
但……
也常常有意外。
有些存在活得太久，久到扰乱了时间的流动。
它们逃避终结，拒绝回归，而世界意识终会凝成缩影，去追猎那些不应继续滞留的魂灵。}
Bg_Line2:
{妮娅的婚礼本该是她人生中最美好的日子。
她穿着洁白的婚纱，站在装满鲜花的教堂里，对面是她心爱的未婚夫——一个看不清面容的男人。
阳光透过彩绘玻璃窗，在她脸上投下斑斓的光点。
“我愿意，”她微笑着说，眼中满是憧憬。
就在这时，她突然抓紧胸口，白纱被一只无形的手揉皱。
她的笑容凝固在脸上，身体像断线的木偶般倒下。
宾客们惊恐的叫声、男人冲上前的身影，都变得遥远而模糊。
妮娅的最后一眼，是教堂拱顶上那些熟悉的壁画。
妮娅是这座小镇第一个这样死去的人，但绝不是最后一个。}
Bg_Line3:
{妮娅的葬礼在三天后举行。
悲伤的男人坚持要亲自为她的墓碑题字——“这里安息着我们挚爱的妮娅，她的笑容比春日阳光更温暖”。
然而，就在葬礼当晚，那个男人也被发现倒在妮娅墓前，手中紧握着一束凋谢的野花，脸上凝固着无法言说的惊恐。
小镇的死亡序幕就此拉开。
每到夜晚，就有居民离奇死亡。
起初是零星几个，后来每晚都有新的遇害者。
恐惧如同瘟疫般蔓延。
王国派来的调查员束手无策，最终以“瘟疫”为名将小镇隔离。
桥梁被炸毁，出口被重兵把守，这座小镇成了被遗忘的孤岛。
居民们从最初的恐慌变为麻木，生活在等待死亡的阴影中。}
Bg_Line4:
{妮娅再次睁开眼时，发现自己躺在冰冷的墓园中。
这是今夜最后的月光了，它洒在一片片墓碑上，如同为死者铺上的银毯。
她不记得自己是怎么来到这里的，脑海中只有婚礼那天的片段记忆。
不远处，两块相邻的墓碑矗立在夜色中。
当妮娅走近时，她颤抖地读出了上面的名字——一块是“妮娅”。
另一块，连名字都被抹去。
“这里安息着我们挚爱的妮娅，她的笑容比春日阳光更温暖”。
自己的墓碑上铭刻着这样一段话。
记忆如潮水般涌来。
她触摸着刻有自己名字的冰冷石碑，然后崩溃地倒在那块无名墓碑前。
她抱着石碑，仿佛这样就能感受到那个她最在乎的人最后的温度。
“对不起，对不起...”她泣不成声，眼泪滴落在坟墓上的泥土中。
她就这样哭泣着，时间悄然间过去了
等到妮娅回过神来。
黄昏的最后一缕光消失在地平线下。
时间过的异常的快。
妮娅感到一阵剧烈的头痛，仿佛有另一个意识正在强行占据她的身体。
她的眼睛从清澈的黑色变为深邃的血红，表情从悲伤转为冷酷。
那是世界的意志，凝结着妮娅纯粹的恨意，它苏醒了。
她站直身体，目光扫过死寂的小镇，嘴角勾起一抹诡异的微笑。}
Bg_Line5:
{妮娅不知道的是，那是源于百年前的一场悲剧。
一位痴迷的炼金术士无法接受心爱的女儿妮娅患上不治之症的事实。
拒绝自然规律的他，执意进行被禁止的灵魂分割实验，试图将死亡的概念从女儿的灵魂中剥离。
“我不会让死神带走你，我的妮娅。”他在满是烛光的实验室里低语，手中拿着古老的炼金仪器。
实验在午夜钟声敲响时开始，也在那时失控。
狂暴的能量不仅吞噬了一个看不起面容的男人和妮娅，更撕裂了他们的灵魂，其扭曲力场永久地扰乱了整个小镇的生死法则。
居民们被困在了一种诡异的状态——既非完全活着，也非完全死去。
而这只是开始。
实验产生的诅咒引来了某些本应安息、却因执念滞留世间的古老精魂，它们依附于此地的异常法则，逃避着本应到来的终结。
世界意志在百年后终于觉醒，它需要一个执行人来修复这失衡的秩序。
而被诅咒的妮娅，正是那位炼金术士的后代，她的灵魂与那场实验产生了奇特的共鸣，使她成为清理这片土地的最佳人选。
当然妮娅并没有这些记忆，百年的时间，这里的人们忘记了他们曾经死过，他们从来没有意识到，自己的生命如此的漫长。}
Bg_Line6:
{克罗洛丝是王国图书馆的前学者助理，对异常现象有着敏锐的嗅觉。
当关于小镇的零星报告传入她耳中时，她直觉这并非简单的瘟疫。
“生死失衡的地方，有趣。”她决定潜入这座被封锁的小镇。
避开守卫的视线后，克罗洛丝被眼前的景象震惊了。
居民们眼神空洞，仿佛只是行走的躯壳。
她注意到墓园中央那个如同黑蝴蝶般的精灵少女——妮娅。
克罗洛丝没有贸然接近，而是选择观察。
她发现妮娅在白天是悲伤的少女，为每一个逝去的生命哀悼，那些她可能认识的人，她的老师、亲人、朋友、邻居；而到了夜晚，却变成冷酷的猎杀者，屠杀着这座城镇所有活着的人。
“不要再哭泣了”克罗洛丝在一天黎明时分，鼓起勇气走向蜷缩在墓碑前的妮娅，“只是哭泣解决不了问题，你从来没有离开过这座墓园”
妮娅抬起泪眼，看着这个陌生女子。
克罗洛丝手中没有武器，只有记录用的笔记本和笔。
“我不会伤害你，”克罗洛丝轻声说。}
Bg_Line7:
{获得了妮娅的初步信任后，克罗洛丝开始研究小镇的历史。
她潜入小镇的档案室，翻阅那些几乎被遗忘的记载。
在厚厚的古籍中，她发现了关于一个男人和他的女儿妮娅的记录。
书中提到，那位炼金术士在女儿死后就神秘失踪了。
睿智如克罗洛丝，她很快就拼凑出了事件的经过，仿佛站在上帝视角。
克罗洛丝将这一发现告诉妮娅。
妮娅沉默良久，红色与蓝色的眼眸交替闪烁，仿佛两个人格在内心激烈对话。
“那我该怎么办？”她最终问道，声音中带着一丝希望。
“我们必须完成百年前未尽的仪式”克罗洛丝指着古籍中的一页，“但不是分割灵魂，而是愈合它。只有这样，才能让这片土地重归平衡。”}
Bg_Line8:
{王国势力并未放弃对小镇的控制。
一支特殊部队受命前来，不仅要回收异常力量的源头——妮娅，还要销毁所有关于小镇真相的记录。
面对强敌，克罗洛丝没有战斗的力量，但她有守护真相的决心。
她将最关键的书页藏在身上，利用对地形的熟悉，带着妮娅躲避追捕。
“他们想抹掉这里的一切，就像抹掉一段错误的历史！掌权者总是这样，无趣，等到百年后的历史总会给他们教训的”克罗洛丝对妮娅说，眼中闪烁着坚定的光芒。
“但现在我们不能让他们得逞！”
这份信念感染了妮娅。
当士兵们包围她们时，妮娅第一次主动唤醒了猎杀人格，但不是为了终结，而是为了守护。时间仿佛在她周围凝固，士兵们的动作变得迟缓，如同陷入泥沼。
克罗洛丝惊讶地看着这一幕。}
Bg_Line9:
{在最后的对抗中，克罗洛丝为保护妮娅而受伤。
鲜血从她的手臂渗出，染红了她的笔记本。
妮娅抱着克罗洛丝，眼泪滴在对方的脸上。
这一刻，她感受到了前所未有的清晰。
百年来，她一直承受着这份痛苦，每到夜晚时，想起一切的妮娅，看着自己杀戮的妮娅，她无能为力，她想要死亡，但她永远无法真正的死掉。
她一直畏惧着那一半灵魂，善良妮娅选择遗忘邪恶妮娅的一切，所以她像是这里普通的居民一样，活着又并非真正活着。
而现在，是时候终结这一切了。
“我会完成仪式”妮娅坚定地说
“生与死，本就不是对立，而是循环的两端。”
“我从未感受过她的那些感受，我从未真正理解过她。”
“我为我周围的一切哭泣、哀伤，但我从未为她哭泣过。”
克罗洛丝紧紧握住妮娅的手，将一本抄写工整的、关于小镇真实历史的小册子塞进她手中。
“去吧，妮娅，我会记住你的，百年前那个善良的女孩，妮娅”}
Bg_Line10:
{午夜钟声响起，妮娅站在墓园中央，那里正是百年前炼金实验室的遗址。
克罗洛丝站在一旁，尽管受伤，仍坚持要见证这一刻。
妮娅闭上眼睛，不再抵抗体内的两种力量，而是让它们自由流动、交融。
她看到了一—百年前的炼金术士，，一个无法接受女儿死亡的可怜父亲。
而他的女儿妮娅，也从未责怪过父亲的选择。
“我原谅你，”妮娅轻声说，这句话既是对炼金术士说，也是对自己说。
“我们都只是渴望爱的灵魂。”
一道温和的光从妮娅身上散发出来，逐渐扩散至整个小镇。
被光芒触及的居民们，那些处于半生半死状态的存在，终于获得了安宁。
有的化作光点消散，有的则重获完整的生命。
妮娅感到自己的身体在变得轻盈，两个人格不再争斗，而是融合成了一个完整的她——既记得生的喜悦，也接纳死的宁静。}
Bg_Line11:
{当朝阳再次升起时，小镇的诅咒已经被解除。
那些魂灵终于得以安息，生死法则重归平衡。
克罗洛丝站在墓园中，不知道自己为什么在这里。
妮娅消失了。
克罗洛丝最终离开了小镇，带着一本写满故事的笔记。
偶然间，她发现故事书上多了一段故事，但她从未记得自己曾经写过。
克罗洛丝看完了整个故事，与城主谈起。
“生命的意义不在于逃避终结，而在于珍惜每一个瞬间。”
“真正的永恒，不是肉体的不死，而是爱在记忆中的延续。”
“城主你觉得呢？”
城主没有说话，而是在思索着什么，那是很久远的故事了，说真的，城主想要见一见那位名为妮娅的少女。}
Bg_Line12:
{某个充满人气的小镇。
连这里的墓园都开满了鲜花。
每逢黄昏时分，人们偶尔能看到一个模糊的身影——一个穿着婚纱的少女，静静地巡视着墓碑，仿佛在守护着每一个安息的灵魂。
她的眼中有悲伤或杀戮，有深深的宁静，如同秋水长天，见证了生命的脆弱与坚韧，死亡的必要与庄严。
在那座刻着“妮娅”的墓碑下，常年盛开着一种不知名的白色小花，即使在最寒冷的冬天也从不凋谢。
这是妮娅的故事，克罗洛丝的书籍记载着这段故事，像是无数段被人们遗忘的历史一样，总会被记录在某本书籍之中。}
Bg_Line1_en:
All things in the world operate by a set of laws.
Life, aging, sickness, death.
Often, accidents skip one of these stages.
Of course, the one stage that can never be skipped is the last.
Everything has its destined end.
Unavoidable.
But…
often, there are exceptions.
Some beings live so long that they disrupt the flow of time itself.
They evade their end, refuse to return, and eventually, the Worldwill condenses into an agent to hunt down those souls that should no longer linger.
Bg_Line2_en:
Niya's wedding should have been the most beautiful day of her life.
She stood in a flower-filled church, wearing a pure white wedding dress, facing her beloved fiancé—a man whose face she could no longer clearly recall.
Sunlight streamed through the stained-glass windows, casting colorful specks of light on her face.
"I do," she said softly, her eyes full of hope.
At that moment, she suddenly clutched her chest, the white fabric crumpled by an invisible hand.
Her smile froze on her face, and her body collapsed like a marionette with its strings cut.
The guests' terrified screams, the man rushing toward her—all became distant and blurred.
Niya's last sight was of the familiar murals on the church's arched ceiling.
Niya was the first in the town to die this way, but not the last.
Bg_Line3_en:
Niya's funeral was held three days later.
The grieving man insisted on inscribing her headstone himself—"Here rests our beloved Niya, whose smile was warmer than the spring sun."
Yet, on the very night of the funeral, that same man was found collapsed before Niya's grave, clutching a withered bouquet of wildflowers, his face frozen in unspeakable terror.
The town's prologue of death had begun.
Each night, residents died under mysterious circumstances.
At first, it was just a few, but soon, new victims appeared every night.
Fear spread like a plague.
Investigators sent by the kingdom were at a loss and eventually quarantined the town under the label of "pestilence."
Bridges were blown up, exits heavily guarded—the town became a forgotten island.
The residents shifted from initial panic to numb resignation, living in the shadow of awaiting death.
Bg_Line4_en:
When Niya opened her eyes again, she found herself lying in the cold cemetery.
It was the last of the moonlight that night, spilling over the rows of headstones like a silver blanket for the dead.
She didn't remember how she got there; only fragments of her wedding day remained in her mind.
Not far away, two adjacent headstones stood in the darkness.
As Niya approached, she trembled while reading the names—one was "Niya."
The other had its name erased.
"Here rests our beloved Niya, whose smile was warmer than the spring sun."
Her own tombstone was inscribed with those words.
Memories flooded back.
She touched the cold stone bearing her name, then collapsed before the nameless grave.
She clung to the headstone as if she could feel the last warmth of the one who mattered most.
"I'm sorry, I'm sorry..." She wept uncontrollably, tears falling on the grave's soil.
She cried like that, and time slipped away unnoticed.
By the time Niya regained her senses,
the last light of dusk had vanished below the horizon.
Time had passed unnaturally fast.
Niya felt a sharp headache, as if another consciousness was forcibly taking over her body.
Her eyes shifted from clear black to a deep blood-red, her expression turning from sorrow to cold ruthlessness.
The Worldwill, condensed from Niya's pure hatred, had awakened.
She stood upright, her gaze sweeping over the lifeless town, a strange smile curling her lips.
Bg_Line5_en:
What Niya never knew was that it all stemmed from a tragedy a century old.
An obsessed alchemist could not accept that his beloved daughter, Niya, was stricken with an incurable illness.
Defying the natural order, he insisted on performing a forbidden soul-splitting experiment, attempting to strip the very concept of death from his daughter's soul.
"I won't let Death take you, my Niya," he whispered in his candlelit laboratory, clutching an ancient alchemical apparatus.
The experiment began as the midnight bell tolled—and at that same moment, spiraled out of control.
The violent energy not only consumed Niya and the man whose face had faded from memory—it tore their souls asunder.
Its distortion field permanently disrupted the town's laws of life and death.
The residents became trapped in a grotesque state—neither fully alive nor fully dead.
And that was only the beginning.
The curse born from the experiment drew ancient spirits that should have rested, yet lingered in the world due to unresolved attachments. They clung to the anomalous laws of this place, evading the end that should have come.
A century later, the Worldwill finally awakened.
It needed an executor to restore balance to this fractured order.
And the cursed Niya, a descendant of that very alchemist, her soul resonating strangely with that long-ago experiment, made her the perfect instrument to cleanse this land.
Of course, Niya retained no memory of this.
A hundred years had passed—the people here forgot they had ever died.
They never realized their lives had stretched so unnaturally long.
Bg_Line6_en:
Crolos, a former scholar's assistant at the Royal Library, had a keen nose for anomalous phenomena.
When scattered reports about the town reached her, her intuition told her this was no simple plague.
"A place where life and death are unbalanced. Interesting." She decided to infiltrate the sealed-off town.
After slipping past the guards, Crolos was stunned by the scene before her.
The residents had hollow eyes, as if they were merely walking shells.
She noticed the elven girl at the cemetery's center—Niya, like a black butterfly.
Crolos didn't approach rashly, choosing instead to observe.
She discovered that by day, Niya was a sorrowful maiden, mourning every lost life—people she might have known: her teacher, family, friends, neighbors. But by night, she became a cold huntress, slaughtering everyone living in the town.
"Stop crying," Crolos finally said at dawn, gathering her courage to approach Niya, who was curled up by a headstone. "Crying won't solve anything. You've never left this cemetery."
Niya looked up with tear-filled eyes at this stranger.
Crolos held no weapons, only a notebook and pen for recording.
"I won't hurt you," Crolos said softly.
Bg_Line7_en:
After gaining Niya's initial trust, Crolos began researching the town's history.
She sneaked into the town's archives, poring over nearly forgotten records.
In a thick, ancient tome, she found an account of a man and his daughter Niya.
The book mentioned that the alchemist had mysteriously vanished after his daughter's death.
As sharp as Crolos was, she quickly pieced together the sequence of events, as if viewing it from a god's perspective.
Crolos shared her discovery with Niya.
Niya fell into a long silence, her eyes flickering between red and blue, as if two personalities were warring within.
"Then what should I do?" she finally asked, a thread of hope in her voice.
"We must complete the ritual that was left unfinished a century ago," Crolos said, pointing to a page in the ancient book. "But not to split the soul—to mend it. Only then can balance be restored to this land."
Bg_Line8_en:
The kingdom's forces had not given up control over the town.
A special unit was dispatched with orders not only to retrieve the source of the anomalous power—Niya—but also to destroy all records revealing the town's truth.
Facing such formidable enemies, Crolos possessed no strength for combat—but she had the resolve to protect the truth.
She hid the most crucial pages on her person and, using her familiarity with the terrain, led Niya in evading pursuit.
“They want to erase everything here, just like wiping away a mistaken chapter of history! Those in power are always like this—dull. A hundred years from now, history will teach them its lesson,” Crolos said to Niya, a firm light gleaming in her eyes.
“But right now—we can’t let them succeed!”
That conviction stirred something in Niya.
When soldiers surrounded them, Niya, for the first time, actively awakened her huntress persona—not to end lives, but to protect.
Time itself seemed to congeal around her; the soldiers’ movements slowed as if mired in thick mud.
Crolos watched, astonished by the scene unfolding before her.
Bg_Line9_en:
In the final confrontation, Crolos was injured protecting Niya.
Blood seeped from her arm, staining her notebook.
Niya held Crolos, her tears falling on the other's face.
In that moment, she felt a clarity she'd never known before.
For a century, she had endured this pain. Every night, Niya remembered everything, watched herself kill, powerless to stop it. She wanted death, but she could never truly die.
She had always feared that half of her soul; the good Niya chose to forget all the evil Niya had done, so she lived like the other residents here—alive, yet not truly living.
Now, it was time to end it all.
"I will complete the ritual," Niya said firmly.
"Life and death are not opposites, but two ends of a cycle."
"I never felt what she felt. I never truly understood her."
"I cried and grieved for everything around me, but I never wept for her."
Crolos gripped Niya's hand tightly, pressing a neatly transcribed booklet about the town's true history into her palm.
"Go, Niya. I will remember you—the kind girl from a century ago, Niya."
Bg_Line10_en:
At the stroke of midnight, Niya stood in the center of the cemetery, the very site of the alchemical laboratory from a hundred years prior.
Crolos stood by, wounded but insisting on witnessing this moment.
Niya closed her eyes, no longer resisting the two forces within her, but letting them flow and merge freely.
She saw him—the alchemist from a century ago, a pitiful father unable to accept his daughter's death.
And his daughter Niya had never blamed her father for his choice.
"I forgive you," Niya whispered, a statement for both the alchemist and herself.
"We are all just souls yearning for love."
A gentle light emanated from Niya, slowly spreading across the entire town.
The residents touched by the light—those in the half-life, half-death state—finally found peace.
Some dissolved into points of light, others regained full life.
Niya felt her body growing light. The two personalities ceased their struggle and merged into a complete self—one who remembered the joy of life and accepted the peace of death.
Bg_Line11_en:
When the sun rose again, the town's curse had been lifted.
The lingering spirits could finally rest; the laws of life and death were back in balance.
Crolos stood in the cemetery, not knowing why she was there.
Niya was gone.
Crolos eventually left the town, carrying a notebook filled with stories.
By chance, she discovered an extra story in the book—one she had no memory of writing.
Crolos read the entire story and discussed it with the Lord.
"The meaning of life isn't about evading the end, but cherishing every moment."
"True eternity isn't the immortality of the flesh, but the continuation of love in memory."
"What do you think, Lord?"
The Lord didn't speak, lost in thought. It was a story from long ago. Truthfully, the Lord wished he could have met the girl named Niya.
Bg_Line12_en:
In a certain lively town,
even the cemetery is filled with flowers.
At dusk, people occasionally glimpse a faint figure—a girl in a wedding dress, quietly watching over the headstones, as if guarding every resting soul.
Her eyes hold no sorrow or violence, only a deep tranquility, like autumn waters under a vast sky, bearing witness to the fragility and resilience of life, the necessity and solemnity of death.
Beneath the headstone marked "Niya," an unknown species of small white flower blooms perennially, never withering, even in the coldest winter.
This is Niya's story. Crolos's book records this tale, like countless forgotten histories, always preserved within the pages of some volume.

Bg_Line1:
{曙光骑士团成立之初，强敌环伺，每一步都走得举步维艰。
旧王国的残余势力恶意将他们污蔑为渎神的魔鬼，一时间，谣言四起，称他们烧杀抢掠，无恶不作。
正是在这片舆论的腥风血雨中，伯爵家的大小姐伊莎贝尔，带着一身被娇惯出的叛逆和一颗被好奇心驱使的心，看到了那张简陋的招聘公告。
身边的人纷纷告诫她：“那是魔鬼之巢，是一群魔鬼组成的骑士团，可千万不能去！”可“不能去”这三个字，恰恰成了最有效的催化剂。
伊莎贝尔扬起下巴，倔强道：“我偏要看看，这所谓的魔鬼之巢，究竟是何模样。”
于是，她隐藏了身份，以一名普通治愈魔法师的名义，踏入了曙光骑士团后勤部的大门。
这是故事的开端，或许伊莎贝尔会后悔踏入了这条——不归路。}
Bg_Line2:
{初入骑士团，伊莎贝尔带着挑剔和审视的目光。
这里的一切都与她熟悉的贵族生活格格不入：粗粝的食物、简陋的营房、疲惫却眼神坚定的面孔。
她最初以为会看到混乱与暴戾，却意外地感受到一种粗糙而真实的秩序。
然后，她看到了阿古丽娅——那个在战场上如同太阳般耀眼的身影。
她看着阿古丽娅带着一身尘土和血迹归来，没有先处理自己的伤口，而是笑着安慰担惊受怕的平民，甚至从染血的胸甲内袋里，掏出一把糖果分给孩子们。
那一刻，伊莎贝尔骄纵的心，被一种从未有过的触动轻轻敲了一下。
她不禁喃喃自语：“她真的，那么不在乎自己吗？”
“我也想要，这样的骑士，一个只属于我的，奋不顾身的骑士”}
Bg_Line3:
{在后勤部的日子，伊莎贝尔有了更多观察阿古丽娅的机会。
她看到阿古丽娅对待每个人，从骑士同僚到流浪孩童，都带着同样的、仿佛与生俱来的温暖笑容。
那种温暖平等地洒在每一个人身上，如同阳光，既慷慨，又……残忍地保持着距离。
在一次清点战场遗物时，伊莎贝尔偶然获得了一把断裂的精灵长剑。
剑身虽残，其上任然晕染着原主阵亡时留下的暴戾能量，这能量与精灵剑本身的光明特质剧烈冲突，让伊莎贝尔感到一种危险的共鸣。
但她悄悄留下了它。
伊莎贝尔找到阿古丽娅，目光灼灼地说：“我不想只在后方施展治愈术了。”
阿古丽娅微笑着问：“那你想做什么呢？”
伊莎贝尔下意识地握紧了藏在袖中的断剑剑柄，感受到一丝冰冷的刺痛，坚定地回答：“我想做更多，能更靠近你的事。”
阿古丽娅没有听出伊莎贝尔的言外之意。
此后，伊莎贝尔动用家族关系为前线争取更多资源，更努力地精进魔法，同时也开始私下研究如何驾驭那把危险的精灵断剑。
只为了......能更靠近那个光芒中心的身影。
她心中那份最初的好奇，逐渐发酵成一种复杂的混合体：
有对阿古丽娅信念的认可；
有对她力量的欣赏；
还有一种她自己也说不清、不敢深究的，想要独占这份光热的悸动。
一种无法言语的，不可名状的，爱意？？？
想到这里伊莎贝尔感觉到心跳加快了不少，袖中的断剑似乎也随之传来一阵微弱的脉动。}
Bg_Line4:
{伊莎贝尔数次尝试暗示自己的特殊情感。
她会特意为阿古丽娅准备更精致的伤药，递过去时说：“这个伤药效果很好，你试试。”
手腕处缠绕的绷带下是被暴戾能量割出的伤口。
在庆功宴上只为她斟酒，轻声说：“这杯酒，敬你。”
故作不经意地提起某些贵族式的、带着暧昧意味的赞美：“你今天真耀眼。”
但眼神深处却闪过一丝被剑中暴戾情绪放大后的偏执。
然而，阿古丽娅总是以那种标志性的、温暖而疏离的微笑回应，感谢她的好意。
然后将她的特殊轻易地化解为对所有战友的关怀，说道：“你对大家都很好，我很感激。”
阿古丽娅是所有人的小太阳，不是她的。
这个认知像一根细刺，扎在伊莎贝尔的心头。
而袖中那把低语的断剑，则不断蛊惑着她更极端的想法。
看着阿古丽娅身边环绕着的、那些同样沐浴着阳光的仰慕者，伊莎贝尔感到一种压抑的、无处宣泄的嫉妒和挫败感正在心底堆积，断剑变得滚烫，仿佛在回应她的情绪。
从小骄纵的伊莎贝尔从未如此感到挫败过。
但又暂时无能为力。
她甚至很难对阿古丽娅说出那句“我喜欢你”或者是“我爱你”}
Bg_Line5:
{讨伐赤达鲁的战斗异常惨烈。
火山脚下，天空被火石染成血色，大地在魔物的咆哮中颤抖。
伊莎贝尔作为战场治愈师，目光始终锁定在冲杀在最前方的阿古丽娅身上。
她的右手紧握着那柄经过初步修复、依旧晕染着不祥能量的精灵长剑，剑身在她手中微微震颤，渴望着战斗与毁灭。
她施展祝福魔法，祝福魔法混合着剑身逸散的暴戾能量，如同扭曲的光带般倾泻而去，缠绕在阿古丽娅的身上，形成一层又一层明暗交错的光晕笼罩着她的骑士，她的阿古丽娅。
也正因如此，当那名战友突然将淬毒的利剑刺向阿古丽娅后背时，伊莎贝尔看得清清楚楚。她惊恐的尖叫被淹没在战场的喧嚣中。
那把利剑精准的划过阿古丽娅破损的盔甲之间。
阿古丽娅反应神速，反手斩杀了偷袭者，但毒液已随着剧烈战斗侵入血脉。
阿古丽娅很快就感受到了一股虚弱的感觉。
硬撑着，阿古丽娅用剑勉强撑起身体。
看着阿古丽娅身形踉跄，伊莎贝尔感觉自己的世界也跟着崩塌了，手中的精灵剑发出尖锐的嗡鸣。
“阿古丽娅!!”伊莎贝尔发出惊呼。}
Bg_Line6:
{当阿古丽娅终于因毒性发作和体力透支而倒下时。
伊莎贝尔心中那根紧绷的弦，彻底断裂。
压抑已久的情感与手中精灵剑积攒的暴戾能量产生共鸣，如同火山般喷发，淹没了所有理智。
“谁也不许动她的阿古丽娅！”这个念头化作了最暴戾的魔力。
她不再仅仅依靠魔法，而是挥动了那柄精灵剑。
剑身爆发出暗红色的光芒，原本温和的治愈之光与剑的暴戾能量混合，在她周身扭曲、变形，凝结成无数把赤红与幽暗交织的魔法飞剑。
杀意如有实质，形成一个恐怖的力场，将靠近的魔物瞬间撕碎。
她宛如地狱归来的复仇者，手持低吼的精灵剑，踩在由自己杀意凝成的剑上，守护着身后那片她用最后理智布下守护魔法的、仅容她和阿古丽娅存在的净土。}
Bg_Line7:
{场面陷入诡异的僵局。
赶到的支援骑士们进退两难。
一方面要抵御赤达鲁和魔物的攻击，另一方面又要警惕着明显陷入癫狂、敌我不分的伊莎贝尔，以及她手中那把散发着不祥气息的精灵剑。
他们看着昏迷不醒的团长，又看看像护食野兽般手持邪异长剑的伊莎贝尔，有人小声嘀咕：“她和她那把剑……到底是想救人，还是想独占功劳，或是……更糟？”
猜疑和恐惧在人群中蔓延。}
Bg_Line8:
{城主的到来打破了平衡。
他没有理会赤达鲁的威胁，目光直接锁定在伊莎贝尔和她手中那柄嗡嗡作响的精灵剑上。
他一步步向前，呼唤着她的名字：“伊莎贝尔！冷静下来！控制你手中的剑！”试图唤醒她的理智。
回应他的是贴着脸颊飞过的、蕴含着黑暗能量的魔法飞剑和更加浓烈的杀意。
伊莎贝尔手中的剑指向城主，暗红色的能量不断汇聚。
当第二把飞剑直刺胸口时，城主展现了他深不可测的实力，徒手抓住了那柄几乎凝成实质的杀戮魔剑，能量的冲击让他掌心崩裂，鲜血直流。
但他的眼神依旧坚定，再次向前，声音沉稳而有力，穿透了伊莎贝尔被黑暗笼罩的意识：“伊莎贝尔！看看你身后！阿古丽娅需要治疗！”}
Bg_Line9:
{在伊莎贝尔扭曲的感知中，世界是一片无边黑暗，只有阿古丽娅是唯一的光源，而她手中的剑正不断将这片黑暗扩大。
她只想带着这束光逃离，去一个安全的地方。
城主的呼喊起初像是遥远的噪音，直到“阿古丽娅”这几个字反复撞击她的耳膜。
她感到手中的精灵剑变得滚烫而沉重，仿佛在抗拒她的清醒。
像是迷雾被拨开，她的视线逐渐清晰。
看到了周围一张张或惊恐、或担忧、或愤怒的面孔，看到了城主流血的手，也看到了静静躺在光罩中、脸色苍白的阿古丽娅。
她低头看着自己手中依旧嗡鸣不止的邪异长剑，一阵后怕袭来。
她喃喃道：“阿古丽娅……我……”
现实的重量和剑带来的反噬瞬间压垮了她透支的精神和身体，精灵剑脱手落下，暗红光芒消散，她也眼前一黑，彻底失去了意识。
漫天的魔法飞剑随之消散成点点光粒。}
Bg_Line10:
{伊莎贝尔在禁闭室里度过了漫长而煎熬的时光。
那把惹祸的精灵剑已被收缴，但它的低语仿佛仍在她脑海中回荡。
身体被魔法和邪剑能量双重反噬的剧痛远不及内心的狂躁。
她反复回想那天的每一个细节。
精灵剑是如何放大她的情感，如何引诱她走向毁灭的边缘。
自己的失控、爆发的杀意、对同僚出手的瞬间；
以及内心深处那份几乎要毁灭一切的、对阿古丽娅的执着，是否早已被那把剑所扭曲？
她对着墙壁自言自语：“那究竟是爱？是扭曲的占有欲？还是被那把剑放大的人性之恶？”
她试图为这份灼热而危险的情感找到一个明确的定义，但最终发现，它复杂得无法用任何一个简单的词汇概括。
而那把剑的存在，让一切变得更加扑朔迷离。
她只知道，这种情感，加上那把剑的力量，强大到足以让她毁灭一切，包括她最想守护的人。}
Bg_Line11:
{阿古丽娅苏醒后，了解了事情的全部经过，包括那把精灵剑的来历和在战斗中的异状。
她亲自解除了伊莎贝尔的禁闭。面对阿古丽娅，伊莎贝尔充满了愧疚和不安，低着头说：“我……我错了。”
“是那把剑……不，是我没能控制住自己……”
但阿古丽娅没有责怪她，反而真诚地感谢她的拼死守护，并为自己让她担心而道歉，说道：“谢谢你，伊莎贝尔，让你担心是我的错。”
“而力量本身并无善恶，关键在于执剑之人。”
“没事的，伊莎贝尔，你做的很好。”
阿古丽娅的目光扫过伊莎贝尔空荡荡的腰间，意有所指。
这场生死危机，意外地拉近了两人的距离。
阿古丽娅开始更频繁地找伊莎贝尔交谈，与她分享自己的经历，也谨慎地提及如何驾驭危险的力量。
两人更像是一种比以往更亲近的、近乎友谊的关系。}
Bg_Line12:
{然而，这份亲近对伊莎贝尔而言，是折磨，也是一种警示。
她清晰地感受到，阿古丽娅的内心最深处，仍然有一片任何人都无法触及的领域。
而她自己，也永远无法忘记那把剑带来的诱惑和失控的感觉。
那片领域只属于过去的哀伤和对众生平等的博爱。
伊莎贝尔学会了克制，不仅是情感上的，还有对力量渴望的克制。
她不再尝试危险的暗示，而是将那份汹涌的情感深深埋藏，转化为在战场上更精准的守护，在后勤更高效的支援。
她请求阿古丽娅帮助她进行控制训练，学习如何面对内心的黑暗面，无论那黑暗是源于情感，还是源于外物。
她需要那个力量，来守护她所爱的人。
她依旧会专注地凝视着阿古丽娅，但目光中多了份清醒的守望，以及一丝历经疯狂后的警惕。
或许，对于注定普照大地的太阳而言，能作为一颗离她较近的星辰，共享一片夜空，便已是命运最好的馈赠。
而那颗星辰，必须确保自身不会燃烧过度，以免坠入黑暗，灼伤所爱之人。
或许吧......}
Bg_Line1_en:
In the early days of the Dawn Knight Order, surrounded by powerful enemies, every step was a struggle.
Remnant forces of the old kingdom maliciously slandered them as blasphemous demons, and for a time, rumors spread that they committed every crime imaginable—burning, killing, and plundering.
It was amidst this storm of public opinion that the young lady of the earl’s household, Isabelle, driven by a rebellious spirit born of privilege and a heart stirred by curiosity, saw that simple recruitment notice.
Those around her warned, “That’s a den of demons, a knight order formed by devils—you mustn’t go!”
But the words “mustn’t go” acted as the most effective catalyst.
Isabelle lifted her chin defiantly. “I insist on seeing what this so-called den of demons really looks like.”
And so, concealing her identity, she entered the gates of the Dawn Knight Order’s logistics department as an ordinary healing mage.
This was the beginning of the story—though perhaps Isabelle would come to regret setting foot on this path of no return.
Bg_Line2_en:
Upon joining the knight order, Isabelle observed everything with a critical eye.
It was all so different from the noble life she knew: coarse food, humble barracks, faces weary yet resolute.
She had expected to see chaos and brutality, but instead, she found a rough yet genuine order.
Then she saw Aguria—that figure who shone like the sun on the battlefield.
She watched Aguria return covered in dust and blood, tending not to her own wounds first, but comforting frightened civilians with a smile, even pulling a handful of candies from within her bloodstained breastplate to give to the children.
In that moment, something in Isabelle’s proud heart trembled with an unfamiliar emotion.
She murmured to herself, “Does she truly care so little for herself?”
“I want a knight like that too—one who’s devoted entirely to me.”
Bg_Line3_en:
During her days in the logistics department, Isabelle had more opportunities to observe Aguria.
She saw how Aguria treated everyone—from fellow knights to wandering children—with the same innate, warm smile.
That warmth fell equally upon all, like sunlight: generous, yet… cruelly distant.
While inventorying battlefield relics, Isabelle came across a broken elven longsword.
Though shattered, it still carried the violent energy imprinted by its former owner at the moment of death—an energy that clashed fiercely with the sword’s inherent light-aligned nature, creating a dangerous resonance within her.
But she secretly kept it.
Isabelle sought out Aguria, her gaze fervent, and said, “I don’t want to just cast healing spells from the rear anymore.”
Aguria smiled and asked, “Then what would you like to do?”
Isabelle instinctively tightened her grip on the broken sword’s hilt hidden in her sleeve, feeling a cold sting, and replied firmly, “I want to do more—to be closer to you.”
Aguria didn’t catch the deeper meaning in her words.
From then on, Isabelle used her family connections to secure more resources for the front lines, honed her magic more diligently, and began privately studying how to master that dangerous broken elven blade—
all just to draw nearer to that radiant figure at the center of the light.
The curiosity she had initially felt slowly fermented into a complex blend:
recognition of Aguria’s convictions,
admiration for her strength,
and a flutter in her heart that she couldn’t quite name or dared not examine too closely—a desire to possess that warmth for herself.
An unutterable, indescribable… love???
At the thought, Isabelle felt her heartbeat quicken, and the broken sword in her sleeve seemed to pulse faintly in response.
Bg_Line4_en:
Isabelle attempted several times to hint at her special feelings.
She would prepare finer healing salves for Aguria, saying, “This ointment works well—you should try it.”
Beneath the bandages on her wrist were wounds carved by the sword’s violent energy.
At victory banquets, she would pour wine only for her, softly toasting, “This cup is for you.”
She would casually offer noble-style compliments laced with ambiguity: “You shine so brightly today.”
Yet deep in her eyes flickered a trace of obsession amplified by the sword’s malevolent influence.
But Aguria always responded with that trademark warm yet distant smile, thanking her for her kindness,
easily dissolving her special attention into care for all her comrades, saying, “You’re so kind to everyone—I’m grateful.”
Aguria was everyone’s little sun—not hers.
This realization lodged like a tiny thorn in Isabelle’s heart.
And the whispering broken sword in her sleeve continually tempted her toward more extreme thoughts.
Watching the admirers surrounding Aguria, all basking in that same sunlight, Isabelle felt a stifling jealousy and frustration building inside her. The broken sword grew hot, as if responding to her emotions.
The willful Isabelle had never felt so defeated—yet she was powerless for now.
She couldn’t even bring herself to say “I like you” or “I love you” to Aguria.
Bg_Line5_en:
The battle against Chidaru was exceptionally brutal.
At the foot of the volcano, the sky was stained crimson by falling embers, and the earth trembled beneath the roars of monstrous creatures.
As a battlefield healer, Isabelle never let her gaze stray from Aguria, who fought at the very forefront.
In her right hand, she clutched the partially restored elven longsword—still seeping with ominous energy—its blade trembling faintly, thirsting for battle and destruction.
She cast blessing spells, but the magic mingled with the violent energy radiating from the sword, twisting into warped ribbons of light that poured forth and coiled around Aguria. Layer upon layer of shifting light and shadow enveloped her knight—her Aguria.
It was precisely because of this that Isabelle saw it all too clearly when a comrade suddenly thrust a poisoned blade toward Aguria’s back.
Her terrified scream was swallowed by the chaos of battle.
The venomous sword slid neatly through a gap in Aguria’s damaged armor.
Aguria reacted with lightning speed, striking down the assailant in a single counterblow—but the poison had already seeped into her bloodstream amid the fierce combat.
A wave of weakness washed over Aguria almost at once.
Struggling, she propped herself up with her own sword.
Watching Aguria stagger, Isabelle felt her own world crumble. The elven blade in her hand let out a sharp, piercing screech.
“Aguria!!” Isabelle cried out in horror.
Bg_Line6_en:
When Aguria finally collapsed from the poison and exhaustion,
the taut string in Isabelle's heart snapped completely.
Her long-suppressed emotions resonated with the violent energy stored within the elven sword, erupting like a volcano and drowning all reason.
"No one touches my Aguria!"—this thought transformed into the most brutal form of magic.
She no longer relied solely on spells—she swung the elven blade.
The sword erupted in dark crimson light. Her once-gentle healing energy twisted and merged with the sword's malevolence, coalescing around her into countless magical blades woven of scarlet and shadow.
Her killing intent became tangible, forming a terrifying force field that shredded any monster that drew near.
She stood like vengeance returned from hell, treading upon swords forged from her own wrath, guarding the small sanctuary she had carved out with the last shred of her reason—a space only for her and Aguria.
Bg_Line7_en:
The situation descended into an eerie stalemate.
The arriving reinforcement knights found themselves in a treacherous position.
On one hand, they had to defend against Chidaru and the monstrous horde;
on the other, they had to remain wary of Isabelle—clearly deranged and hostile to all—and the ominous elven sword in her grasp.
They glanced at their unconscious captain, then at Isabelle, who stood guard like a beast defending its prey, the malevolent energy of the blade pulsing around her.
Someone murmured under their breath, “She and that sword… is she trying to save her, claim glory for herself, or… something worse?”
Speculation and fear began to spread through their ranks like a shiver.
Bg_Line8_en:
The Lord's arrival shattered the stalemate.
Ignoring the threat posed by Chidaru, his gaze locked directly onto Isabelle and the ominously humming elven sword in her grasp.
He advanced step by step, calling her name: "Isabelle! Calm down! Control the sword in your hand!"—attempting to pierce through her madness and reach her reason.
His answer was a magical blade infused with dark energy that shot past his cheek, followed by an even denser wave of killing intent.
Isabelle pointed her sword at the Lord, dark crimson energy continuously gathering around its form.
When a second blade thrust straight for his chest, the Lord revealed his profound power, catching the nearly solidified blade of killing intent with his bare hand. The energy impact split his palm, sending blood streaming down.
Yet his eyes remained unwavering as he pressed forward again, his voice steady and forceful, cutting through the darkness shrouding Isabelle's mind: "Isabelle! Look behind you! Aguria needs treatment!"
Bg_Line9_en:
In Isabelle's distorted perception, the world was an endless darkness, with Aguria as the only source of light—and the sword in her hand was steadily expanding that darkness.
All she wanted was to take this light and flee, to find a safe place.
The Lord’s calls initially sounded like distant noise, until the name “Aguria” struck her ears again and again.
She felt the elven sword in her hand grow scorching hot and heavy, as if resisting her return to clarity.
It was as though a mist had been lifted—her vision gradually cleared.
She saw the surrounding faces—some terrified, some worried, some angry. She saw the Lord’s bleeding hand, and she saw Aguria, lying pale and still within the protective glow.
She looked down at the still-humming, sinister longsword in her hand, and a wave of belated fear washed over her.
She murmured, “Aguria… I…”
The weight of reality and the sword’s backlash instantly crushed her already exhausted mind and body. The elven sword fell from her grasp, its dark crimson glow fading, and her vision went black as she completely lost consciousness.
The sky full of magical blades dissolved into scattered particles of light.
Bg_Line10_en:
Isabelle spent long, torturous days in the confinement chamber.
The troublesome elven sword had been confiscated, but its whispers seemed to still echo in her mind.
The physical agony from the dual backlash of magic and the blade’s corrupting energy was nothing compared to the turmoil within.
Over and over, she replayed every detail of that day:
how the elven sword had amplified her emotions,
how it had lured her to the brink of destruction.
Her loss of control, the explosive killing intent, the moment she turned against her own comrades—
and that near-annihilating obsession with Aguria buried deep in her heart…
Had it already been twisted by the sword?
She spoke to the wall as if to herself:
“Was it love? A distorted desire to possess? Or merely the evil in human nature magnified by that blade?”
She tried to define this burning, dangerous feeling with a clear label,
only to find it was too complex to be captured by any single word.
And the existence of that sword made everything even more elusive.
All she knew was this:
that emotion, combined with the sword’s power, was strong enough to destroy everything—
even the one she most wanted to protect.
Bg_Line11_en:
After Aguria regained consciousness and learned the full story—including the origin of the elven sword and its strange behavior during the battle—she personally released Isabelle from confinement.
Facing Aguria, Isabelle was filled with guilt and unease. She hung her head and said, "I... I was wrong."
"It was the sword... No, it was my failure to control myself..."
But Aguria did not blame her. Instead, she sincerely thanked her for her desperate protection and even apologized for making her worry, saying, "Thank you, Isabelle. I'm sorry for making you fear for me."
"Power itself holds no inherent good or evil—it all depends on the one who wields it."
"It's alright, Isabelle. You did well."
Aguria's gaze swept over Isabelle's empty waist, her glance carrying unspoken meaning.
This life-and-death crisis unexpectedly drew the two closer.
Aguria began seeking out Isabelle more often, sharing stories of her own experiences and cautiously discussing how to harness dangerous power.
Their relationship grew into something closer than before—a bond akin to friendship.
Bg_Line12_en:
Yet, for Isabelle, this newfound closeness was both torment and a warning.
She clearly sensed that deep within Aguria, there remained a realm no one could ever touch—a space reserved only for past sorrows and a universal, impartial love for all living beings.
And she herself could never forget the temptation and the feeling of losing control that the sword had brought.
Isabelle learned restraint—not only of her emotions, but also of her thirst for power.
She no longer ventured dangerous hints, instead burying those turbulent feelings deep within, transforming them into more precise protection on the battlefield and more efficient support in logistics.
She asked Aguria to help her with control training, to learn how to face the darkness within—whether it stemmed from emotion or external forces.
She needed that power to protect the one she loved.
She still watched Aguria with focused intensity, but now her gaze held the clarity of vigilance and a wariness born from having tasted madness.
Perhaps, for a sun destined to shine upon the whole world, being a star relatively close to her, sharing the same stretch of night sky, was already the greatest gift fate could offer.
And that star must ensure it never burns too fiercely, lest it fall into darkness and scorch the very one it loves.
Perhaps...

Bg_Line1:
{克罗洛丝最近总是很困，自己发现自己丢失了很多记忆。
记忆中有一位穿着婚纱的少女身影经久不散。
克罗洛丝翻看自己的日记，很多地方的字迹逐渐变淡。
克罗洛丝意识到，即便是文字也会随着时间而逐渐消磨。
记忆逐渐在丢失，那么自己存在于这个世界的证明呢？
多少时间后，自己的存在会被时间彻底抹除。
克罗洛丝准备去看看她的老朋友，当然还有那个过去的自己。
她穿上了缪西卡为她准备的新衣。
或许时间所剩不多了吧，那么，最终的时间魔法或许在此刻发动最为适合。
于是，她回到了过去}
Bg_Line2:
{克罗洛丝回到了和尤缇迦学习魔法的时刻，看着那个幼小的自己，克罗洛丝躲在树后，能够再次看到尤缇迦老师，真的非常庆幸。
随着教学的结束，尤缇迦在让年幼的克罗洛丝自己回去之后，从树后将克罗洛丝抓了出来。
“看起来你的时间所剩不多了。”尤缇迦摸了摸克罗洛丝的脑袋，克罗洛丝猛然抱住了尤缇迦。
“老师，我知道，但我还不想离开，还有很多很多，未尽的冒险，我还想去”克罗洛丝哭诉着，眼泪不争气的落了下来。
尤缇迦只是笑着，似乎并不为此感到悲伤，或许一切不像是克罗洛丝想的那么糟糕。}
Bg_Line3:
{克罗洛丝回到了他在王国做学者助理的时候，那个时候的她充满活力，总爱四处探险。
她再次见到了那位穿着婚纱的少女——妮娅。
她再次见证了她和她的所有冒险，终于知晓自己失去的那段记忆到底是什么。
她无法影响时间，但是，她了解自己，她把她和她的故事再一次写进了那本日记里面。
直到后来和城主谈起，那段美好的充满白色小花的故事。
克罗洛丝再次回到了那座城镇，在那个夜晚，再次见到了妮娅。
“看，我没有忘记你哦！”妮娅这样说着。
“看起来，你也没有忘记我呢”妮娅给了克罗洛丝一个大大的怀抱。}
Bg_Line4:
{似乎，克罗洛丝不再抗拒着时间的消逝，当然，拥有时间魔法的克罗洛丝既然可以回到时间的任意节点。
那么也意味着，克罗洛丝永远活在所有的时间，只是记忆不同，但是，那些记得克罗洛丝的人尤缇迦、缪西卡、妮娅等等，会永远记得她，
这个世界，她曾来过，这个世界，有她的冒险，她的牵绊，她的记忆。
克罗洛丝回到了自己的房间，合上了日记。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Crolos has been feeling very sleepy lately and has realized she has lost many memories.
The image of a young girl in a wedding dress lingers persistently in her memory.
Crolos flips through her diary and finds the handwriting in many places gradually fading.
Crolos realizes that even words can erode over time.
Memories are gradually fading, so what proof is there of her existence in this world?
How much time will pass before her existence is completely erased by time?
Crolos decides to visit her old friends, and of course, her past self.
She puts on the new clothes prepared for her by Mousika.
Perhaps time is running out. If so, perhaps now is the most suitable moment to activate the ultimate time magic.
And so, she returned to the past.
Bg_Line2_en:
Crolos returned to the time when she was learning magic from Utija. Watching her younger self, Crolos hid behind a tree, feeling immensely grateful to see Teacher Utija again.
As the lesson ended, after sending the young Crolos home, Utija pulled Crolos out from behind the tree.
"It seems your time is running out," Utija said, patting Crolos's head. Crolos suddenly hugged Utija tightly.
"Teacher, I know, but I don't want to leave yet. There are still so many, so many adventures left unfinished, I still want to go," Crolos wept, tears falling uncontrollably.
Utija just smiled, seemingly not saddened by this. Perhaps things weren't as bad as Crolos thought.
Bg_Line3_en:
Crolos returned to the time when she worked as a scholar's assistant in the kingdom. She was full of energy back then, always eager to explore everywhere.
She once again met that young girl in the wedding dress—Niya.
She witnessed all her adventures with her again and finally understood what those lost memories were.
She couldn't influence time, but she knew herself. She wrote her story with her once more into that diary.
Until later, when she spoke with the town lord about that beautiful story filled with little white flowers.
Crolos returned to that town once again and, on that night, saw Niya again.
"See, I haven't forgotten you!" Niya said.
"It seems you haven't forgotten me either," Niya said, giving Crolos a big hug.
Bg_Line4_en:
It seems Crolos is no longer resisting the passage of time. Of course, since Crolos, who possesses time magic, can return to any point in time,
It also means Crolos lives forever in all times, even if her memories differ. However, those who remember Crolos—Utija, Mousika, Niya, and others—will remember her forever.
This world, she once came here. This world holds her adventures, her bonds, her memories.
Crolos returned to her room and closed her diary.

Bg_Line1:
{当救赎无望换来感恩,当对生命的渴望超过了生命本身的长度；
欲望膨胀到了自身能力之外,人们开始渴求非人所及的力量；
永远无法满足的人啊，在见到苍色魔女之前依旧保持着理所应当；
直到那苍色之火焚烧之时，所有破格的贪欲终将被燃烧殆尽。}
Bg_Line2:
{这是妮克丝救助的不知道多少人，她逐渐感到厌倦，人们对于生的渴望强烈的恐怖。
一点随时能够痊愈的小小伤口，一点很快就能痊愈的疾病，却因为恐惧而无限放大。
只是听闻妮克丝能够治愈近乎所有的疾病和伤口，便如同嗅到食物的鬣狗，狂奔而来。
若只是对于伤痛和疾病的恐惧暂且可以理解，但追求无穷尽的生命，便是破格的奢望。
人们总说：“若没有疾病，便不会死亡”，真的如此吗？}
Bg_Line3:
{妮克丝在研究中发现，灵魂具备一定的能量，且可以长久的燃烧，而这个世界的灵魂，近乎是无穷无尽，像是算不尽的圆周常数，她将贪欲之灵燃烧，化作永不熄灭的火焰，贪欲未被完全消磨之前，火焰也会永远不灭。
妮克丝将人心中多余的贪欲燃烧，并且依旧执行着对于生命的敬畏，只是丢掉多余贪欲的人变得知足常乐，这对于王国来说并非一件好事。}
Bg_Line2_en:
This was one among countless souls Nyx had aided, and she was growing weary. The human hunger for survival was terrifying in its intensity.
A minor wound that would heal on its own, an illness soon to pass—yet magnified infinitely by fear.
Upon merely hearing that Nyx could cure almost any ailment or injury, they charged forth like hyenas scenting prey.
Fear of pain and sickness might be understandable, but to seek endless life—that was a transgressive delusion.
People often say, “Without illness, there would be no death.” But is that truly so?
Bg_Line3_en:
In her research, Nyx discovered that souls possess a certain energy, one that could burn for a very long time. And the souls of this world were nearly infinite, like the unending constant of pi. She burned the spirits of greed, turning them into inextinguishable flames; until greed was fully consumed, the fire would never die.
Nyx burned away the excess greed in people’s hearts, while still upholding reverence for life. Yet those stripped of their surplus desires became content and at ease—which was not a good thing for the kingdom.
Bg_Line4_en:
In the end, the kingdom launched a crusade against the Silent Altar. They could no longer bear a world so diminished of desire, for it had brought the kingdom’s progress to a standstill. Nyx was branded a witch.
Whenever that wisp of azure soul‑fire appeared, desires were incinerated, diseases cured, and pain taken away.
No matter what, let there be praise—chant the name of the Azure Witch: Nyx.

Bg_Line1:
{你明白高级魔法师不是费伊的终点，这只是起点而已，费伊寻找的是终极的魔法，一个能够反复重启世界的魔法。
好在费伊非常睿智，她隐藏了自己高阶魔法师的身份，混迹在各种各样的冒险团队中，几乎所有的冒险团队或多或少都有费伊的身影。
费伊从不会急于求成，作为队伍中的魔法师，她一直担任着辅助的职责，负责给队伍中的队友附加各种增益魔法，就这样跟随一个又一个的队伍，经历一场又一场的冒险。 
伊人脚步未停，逐渐行遍千山万水。}
Bg_Line2:
{愿力与执念皆化作她前行的灯火，察觉到魔法的本质后，费伊感觉自己越来越接近世界的本质了，她逐渐感知到世界壁垒，逐渐能够感觉到那道一直在注视着她的身影，那是神吗？她不确定。
你也曾远远窥见她碰壁时的落寞，费伊也曾无数次的尝试影响什么，但是壁垒并没有被打碎，那就像一道无法逾越的墙。
终在无数次碰壁之后，费伊对于魔法的钻研逐渐变得狂热起来，她看过所有古老的魔法书，连落灰不知道多少年的魔法书都翻了出来。
寻道之路终有回响，直到后来，作为城主的你给她加冕，那是所有魔法师都梦寐以求的最高称谓——法神。}
Bg_Line3:
{世间再无第二人能及她的魔法造诣，法神，意为在魔法的领域中，她已经宛若神明。
界域的规则在她眼前终于展露真容，她触及到了魔法的极点，终于是可以稍微改动一些什么。
真正属于她的传奇，在这一刻正式开篇，那一天她使用了最强大的魔法，作用于整个世界，整个世界的魔力浓度高了不知道多少个等级。
理所应当，那些荣光与赞颂尽数涌向了她，人们认为，那是法神的赐福，他们高呼着法神之名。}
Bg_Line1_en:
You understand that being a High Mage is not Faye's end, it is merely the beginning. What Faye seeks is the ultimate magic, a magic capable of repeatedly restarting the world.
Fortunately, Faye is very wise. She concealed her identity as a High Mage and mingled with various adventure teams. Almost every adventure team has, more or less, seen Faye's presence.
Faye never seeks quick success. As the team's mage, she always fulfills a support role, responsible for casting various enhancement magics on her teammates. Thus, she followed one team after another, experiencing adventure after adventure.
Her footsteps never ceased, gradually traversing mountains and rivers.
Bg_Line2_en:
Her willpower and obsession transformed into the guiding light on her path. After perceiving the essence of magic, Faye felt she was getting closer to the essence of the world. She gradually sensed the world's barrier, and gradually became aware of the figure that had always been watching her. Was that a god? She wasn't sure.
You have also glimpsed her desolation from afar when she hit a wall. Faye attempted countless times to influence something, but the barrier was never shattered. It was like an insurmountable wall.
Finally, after countless setbacks, Faye's dedication to researching magic gradually became fervent. She read every ancient grimoire, even digging out those that had been gathering dust for who knows how many years.
The path of seeking the truth eventually echoed. Later, as the City Lord, you crowned her with the highest title every mage dreams of — the God of Magic.
Bg_Line3_en:
No one else in the world could match her magical attainments. God of Magic, meaning that in the realm of magic, she was akin to a deity.
The rules of the domain finally revealed their true form before her eyes. She had touched the pinnacle of magic and could finally alter some things, however slightly.
The legend truly belonging to her officially began at this moment. That day, she cast the most powerful magic, affecting the entire world. The world's mana concentration rose by who knows how many levels.
Naturally, all the glory and praise surged towards her. People believed it was the blessing of the God of Magic, and they chanted the name of the God of Magic.

Bg_Line1:
{为什么乌里托餐厅会一直经营下去永远不会倒闭，这和城主有莫大的关系，作为整个城市人流量最大的地方，这里几乎没有查不到的消息，而这个突兀出现在城市中心的乌里托餐厅，更是耐人寻味。
并不是每天夜晚雅雅都会出现在乌里托餐厅，更多时候，作为首席情报官的雅雅都需要前往别的城市和王国探听情报，这个时候的雅雅卸下了兔女郎的装束，换回了华丽的宴会礼服。
这是雅雅的另一个身份，当然也是编造的身份，为的只是能够更好的潜入宴会。
宴会总在夜晚举行，而她则是整个宴会中最华丽的焦点。}
Bg_Line2:
{每次任务结束，雅雅都会丢掉身上沉重的配饰，这些看似华丽的装饰品实际上并不值钱，都是劣质的仿造品，只需要几个铜币就可以购买到，凭借着雅雅的装束没有人质疑装饰品的真假。
几乎大部分的任务时间，雅雅都会露出灿烂的笑容，但是只有任务结算的时候，雅雅受到任务结算的一大袋金币的时候，听着金币碰撞的声音，才会露出真心的笑容。
乌里托餐厅雅雅虽然是老板，但是大部分的经营所得都需要交给城主。
实际上雅雅很穷，因为穷久了，所以愈发害怕贫穷，夜晚只有躺在金币堆中才能感受到片刻的宁静。}
Bg_Line3:
{雅雅贫穷的更多原因是，几乎每次任务之后，她总会将身上为数不多的金币捐了出去，她认为很多人比自己更需要这一笔钱。
这里的人们都很喜欢雅雅小姐，在阳光照耀的地方，所有的人都很喜欢雅雅小姐，雅雅小姐也总会对他们露出笑容。
无论是餐厅、商店、宴会，雅雅永远是最夺目的一个。
这是我们的雅雅，是最可爱最乖巧的那个。
雅雅小姐天天开心。
——记录于城主日记的某页。}
Bg_Line1_en:
Why does the Ulito Restaurant keep operating forever without ever closing? This has a great deal to do with the City Lord. As the place with the highest foot traffic in the entire city, there is hardly any information that cannot be found here. And this Ulito Restaurant, abruptly appearing in the city center, is even more intriguing.
It's not that Yaya appears at the Ulito Restaurant every night. More often than not, as the Chief Intelligence Officer, Yaya needs to travel to other cities and kingdoms to gather intelligence. At such times, Yaya removes her bunny girl attire and changes back into a gorgeous banquet dress.
This is another identity of Yaya's, of course, also a fabricated one, aimed solely at better infiltrating banquets.
Banquets are always held at night, and she is always the most gorgeous focal point of the entire event.
Bg_Line2_en:
After each mission ends, Yaya discards the heavy accessories on her. These seemingly gorgeous ornaments are actually worthless, all cheap imitations that can be bought for just a few copper coins. Thanks to Yaya's outfit, no one questions the authenticity of the accessories.
For most of her mission time, Yaya wears a brilliant smile. But only when the mission is settled, when Yaya receives a big bag of gold coins as payment and hears the clinking sound of the coins, does she reveal a genuine smile.
Although Yaya is the owner of the Ulito Restaurant, most of its operating income must be handed over to the City Lord.
In reality, Yaya is very poor. Having been poor for so long, she has become increasingly afraid of poverty. Only at night, lying amidst a pile of gold coins, can she find a moment of peace.
Bg_Line3_en:
The greater reason for Yaya's poverty is that almost after every mission, she always donates the few gold coins she has on her. She believes many people need this money more than she does.
The people here really like Miss Yaya. In places where the sunlight shines, everyone likes Miss Yaya, and Miss Yaya always smiles at them.
Whether at the restaurant, in shops, or at banquets, Yaya is always the most dazzling one.
This is our Yaya, the cutest and most well-behaved one.
Wishing Miss Yaya happiness every day.
— Recorded on a certain page of the City Lord's diary.
